docs.title: 🇯🇵 My Japanese Notes
docs.text: A personal Japanese learning workspace with two systems:

docs.title: 📓 Vocabulary Notes
docs.text:
Personal notes generated by my Telegram bot. Send Japanese text, the bot analyzes it and saves a structured note.

Each note includes: - 分詞解析 (word breakdown) - 意思 (meaning) - 例句 (example sentence) - 出典 (source) - 参考 (references)

docs.title: 📐 Grammar Reference
docs.text:
Static reference pages covering N5–N1 grammar patterns (636 pages), generated from JLPT grammar JSON data.

Browse by level: N5 · N4 · N3 · N2 · N1

docs.title: 1. jamdict-data Installation — WinError 32
docs.text:
Error:

[WinError 32] 程序無法存取檔案，因為檔案正由另一個程序使用。: 'jamdict_data/jamdict.db.xz'

Cause: Windows Defender locks the .xz file during extraction.

Fix: - Temporarily disable Windows Defender real-time protection during installation - Or download jamdict.db.xz directly from Google Drive and extract manually with 7-Zip: https://drive.google.com/drive/u/1/folders/1z4zF9ImZlNeTZZplflvvnpZfJp3WVLPk - Put extracted jamdict.db in jamdictdb/jamdict.db

docs.title: 2. jamdict Cannot Open Database
docs.text:
Error:

sqlite3.OperationalError: unable to open database file

Cause 1: Wrong parameter name — use db_file not db_path:

# wrong
jam = Jamdict(db_path="...")

# correct
jam = Jamdict(db_file="...")

Cause 2: Folder and file have the same name:

jamdict.db/        ← folder
└── jamdict.db     ← actual file

Use the full nested path:

jam = Jamdict(db_file=str(BASE_DIR / "jamdictdb" / "jamdict.db"))

docs.title: 3. Git Not Found in PowerShell
docs.text:
Error:

git : 無法辨識 'git' 詞彙

Cause: Git was installed after PowerShell was opened, so PATH wasn't updated.

Fix: - Close and reopen PowerShell - Or add Git to PATH permanently:

[System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("PATH", $env:PATH + ";C:\Program Files\Git\cmd", "User")
  • Note: In PowerShell use where.exe git not where git

docs.title: 4. Git Not Found in VSCode Terminal
docs.text:
Error:

FileNotFoundError: [WinError 2] 系統找不到指定的檔案

Cause: VSCode terminal doesn't inherit updated system PATH.

Fix — add to VSCode settings.json:

{
    "terminal.integrated.env.windows": {
        "PATH": "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd;${env:PATH}"
    }
}

Or hardcode the path directly in the bot:

GIT = r"C:\Program Files\Git\cmd\git.exe"

docs.title: 5. GitHub File Size Limit
docs.text:
Error:

remote: error: File jamdictdb/jamdict.db is 310.32 MB; this exceeds GitHub's file size limit of 100.00 MB

Cause: jamdictdb/ was not in .gitignore before first commit.

Fix:

git rm -r --cached jamdictdb/
git filter-repo --path jamdictdb/ --invert-paths --force
git remote add origin https://github.com/username/repo.git
git push origin master --force

Make sure .gitignore contains:

jamdictdb/

docs.title: 6. Token Accidentally Pushed to GitHub
docs.text:
Cause: .env was not in .gitignore before first commit.

Fix: 1. Revoke token immediately via @BotFather → /mybots → Revoke token 2. Remove from Git history:

python -m git_filter_repo --path .env --invert-paths --force
git remote add origin https://github.com/username/repo.git
git push origin master --force
  1. Create new .env with new token
  2. Make sure .gitignore contains .env

docs.title: 7. git filter-repo Not Recognized
docs.text:
Error:

git: 'filter-repo' is not a git command

Fix:

pip install git-filter-repo
python -m git_filter_repo --path .env --invert-paths --force

docs.title: 8. Wrong Branch Name
docs.text:
Error:

error: src refspec main does not match any

Cause: Default branch is master not main.

Fix:

git branch          ← check current branch name
git push -u origin master

docs.title: 9. Author Identity Unknown
docs.text:
Error:

Author identity unknown — Please tell me who you are.

Fix:

git config --global user.email "your@email.com"
git config --global user.name "YourName"

docs.title: 10. run_polling() Unexpected Keyword Argument
docs.text:
Error:

Application.run_polling() got an unexpected keyword argument 'read_timeout'

Cause: Timeout arguments moved to ApplicationBuilder in newer versions.

Fix:

app = (
    ApplicationBuilder()
    .token(TOKEN)
    .read_timeout(30)
    .write_timeout(30)
    .connect_timeout(30)
    .pool_timeout(30)
    .build()
)
app.run_polling(
    allowed_updates=Update.ALL_TYPES,
    drop_pending_updates=True,
)

docs.title: 11. Kotobank 404 Error
docs.text:
Error: Page not found on Kotobank.

Cause: Kotobank direct word URLs require an internal ID number.

Fix: Use search URL instead:

# wrong
https://kotobank.jp/word/{word}

# correct
https://kotobank.jp/search/{word}

docs.title: 12. MkDocs gh-deploy — Git Not Found
docs.text:
Error:

ERROR - Could not find git - is it installed and on your path?

Fix: Run in Command Prompt instead of PowerShell:

conda activate myenv
cd C:\Users\User\Documents\Japanese
mkdocs gh-deploy

docs.title: General Tips
docs.text:
• Always run git status before git push to check what files will be committed
  • Use git reset HEAD~1 to undo the last commit before pushing
  • .env and jamdictdb/ should never appear in git status as staged files
  • In PowerShell use where.exe git instead of where git
  • Restart VSCode completely after installing new tools for PATH to update

docs.title: 關於這個筆記系統
docs.text: 這個網站的筆記由一個 Telegram bot 自動生成。每當你在 Telegram 輸入一個日文句子，bot 會自動分析、查詢，並將結果儲存為結構化的 Markdown 筆記。

docs.title: 原句 (Original)
docs.text: 你輸入的原始日文字串，原封不動保存。

docs.title: 分詞解析 (Morphological Analysis)
docs.text:
使用 fugashi + UniDic 將句子拆成詞素，每個詞素標注：

欄位 說明 表面形 文字中實際出現的字串 讀音 平假名讀音 詞性 名詞／動詞／助動詞／助詞 等 原形 辭書形，例如「食べ」→「食べる」

docs.title: 意思 (Meaning)
docs.text: 使用 JMdict 離線字典自動查詢，依詞性篩選最相關的意思。只顯示名詞、動詞、形容詞、副詞，助詞和助動詞的說明由下方文法區塊處理。

docs.title: 文法 (Grammar)
docs.text:
Step 2：辨識句子中的助動詞和複合語尾，例如：

語尾 說明 〜ていない 進行否定（還沒在做） 〜てしまう 完了／遺憾 ない 否定 た 過去／完了

若遇到未收錄的助動詞，會顯示 ⚠️ 未收錄 提示。

docs.title: 文法模板 (Grammar Pattern)
docs.text:
Step 3：比對句子中的高頻文法結構，例如：

模板 說明 Vたことがある 曾經～過（經驗） Vなければならない 必須～（義務） VことができるV 能夠～（可能） Vてから 做完～之後（順序）

目前收錄約 50 個模板，涵蓋 N5 至 N1 常見句型。

docs.title: 例句 (Example)
docs.text: 使用 Massif 語料庫 API 自動查詢，優先搜尋包含原句或關鍵詞的真實例句。若查詢失敗會顯示警告。

docs.title: 出典 (Source)
docs.text: 例句來源。自動查詢標注 Massif，手動輸入標注 手動入力。

docs.title: 参考 (Reference)
docs.text: Kotobank 和 Weblio 的查詢連結，方便進一步確認。

docs.title: ⚠️ 免責聲明
docs.text:
本筆記系統的內容由以下來源自動生成：

  • 意思：JMdict 離線字典（可能有遺漏或不精確）
  • 文法分析：規則程式自動產生（不保證完整性）
  • 例句：Massif 語料庫（真實語料，但不保證符合語境）

所有內容僅供個人學習參考。建議重要詞彙以 Kotobank 或 Weblio 等權威來源進行確認。

docs.title: ~あっての
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning thanks to / which owes everything to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私がこんなに日本語がうまくなったのも、先生の指導あってのことです。

My Japanese has improved so much thanks entirely to my teacher's guidance.

docs.title: ~いかんだ / いかんでは / いかんによっては
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning depending on...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
面接の結果いかんでは、アメリカに引っ越すことになるかもしれません。

Depending on the results of the interview, I might have to move to America.

docs.title: ~いかんにかかわらず / いかんによらず / いかんを問わず
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning regardless of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
成績いかんにかかわらず、出席日数さえあれば卒業できる。

Regardless of your grades, you can graduate as long as you have the required attendance.

docs.title: いずれにしても / いずれにしろ / いずれにせよ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in any case / either way

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
タクシーで行こうが、バスで行こうが、いずれにしろもう遅刻です。

Whether we take a taxi or a bus, we're going to be late either way.

docs.title: ~うちに入らない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning doesn't count as / doesn't fall under...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
お菓子なんて食事のうちに入らないだろう。ちゃんと食べなきゃ。

Snacks don't count as a meal. You have to eat properly.

docs.title: ~が/も〜なら、〜が/も〜だ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning like father, like son / both are just as bad

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
親が親なら、子も子だね。

Like parent, like child. (They are both bad)

docs.title: ~か否か
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning whether or not

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
大学に行くか否かで迷っている。

I am torn about whether or not to go to university.

docs.title: ~限りだ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning feel extremely...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
来月から息子が一人暮らしすることになった。さびしい限りだ。

My son is going to live alone starting next month. I feel extremely lonely.

docs.title: ~かたがた
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning while at it / for the purpose of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この間のお礼かたがたお伺いしたいんですが、よろしいでしょうか。

I'd like to visit you to express my thanks for the other day, if that's alright.

docs.title: ~かたわら
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning while / on the side...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
本業のかたわら、週末にはカフェで自作のケーキを売っています。

While working my main job, I sell homemade cakes at a cafe on weekends.

docs.title: ~としてあるまじき
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning unworthy of / unbecoming for...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
患者を見捨てるなんて、医者としてあるまじき行為ですよ。

Abandoning a patient is an act unworthy of a doctor.

docs.title: ~とて
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even if / although...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
先生とて人間です。腹が立つこともあるでしょう。

Even a teacher is human. They probably get angry sometimes.

docs.title: ~とは
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning to think that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼が私の父親だったとは。

To think that he was my father.

docs.title: ~とはいえ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning although / even though...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私はアメリカ人とはいえ日本で生まれ育ったので、日本語は問題ない。

Although I am American, I was born and raised in Japan, so my Japanese is fine.

docs.title: ~とは打って変わって
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning completely different from...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
昨日とは打って変わって、今日いい天気だ。

Completely different from yesterday, today the weather is nice.

docs.title: ~とばかりに
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as if to say...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
料理を食べて、まずいとばかりに顔をしかめた。

Upon eating the food, he frowned as if to say it was disgusting.

docs.title: ~とは比べものにならない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning cannot be compared to / is nothing compared to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
兄は、弟の僕とは比べものにならないほど頭がいい。

My older brother is so smart that I, his younger brother, cannot even be compared to him.

docs.title: ~とまではいかないが / とまではいかないにしても
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning not to the extent of... but...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
満点とまではいかないが、それに近い点数で合格した。

I didn't get a perfect score, but I passed with a score close to it.

docs.title: ~と見るや
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as soon as one sees/realizes...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
警察と見るや、若者グループはバラバラに逃げ出した。

As soon as they saw the police, the group of youths scattered and ran away.

docs.title: ~とも〜とも
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning unable to say whether A or B

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
いいとも悪いとも言えないよ、あなたの選択だからね。

I can't say whether it's good or bad, because it's your choice.

docs.title: ~がてら
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning on the same occasion / while...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
散歩がてら近くに住む姉の家によく行きます。

I often go to my sister's house nearby while taking a walk.

docs.title: ~ともあろうものが
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning of all people / for someone in the position of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
警察官ともあろうものが、犯罪者とグルだったなんて。

To think that a police officer, of all people, was in cahoots with criminals.

docs.title: ともなく
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning without specifically doing... / from nowhere in particular

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
どこからともなく鳥の声が聞こえてきた。

A bird's song could be heard from nowhere in particular.

docs.title: ~ともなれば/ともなると
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning when it comes to... / once it becomes...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
年末年始ともなると、実家に帰省する人が多く新幹線の切符も取りにくい。

When the New Year holidays arrive, many people return to their hometowns, making it hard to get Shinkansen tickets.

docs.title: ~ないでもない / ないものでもない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning it is not that... not...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あなたの気持ちはわからないでもないんだけど、まずは謝るべきだよ。

It's not that I don't understand how you feel, but you should apologize first.

docs.title: ~ないとも限らない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning there is a possibility that... / not completely impossible

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この地域にも大地震が起こらないとも限らないので、準備はしておいたほうがいい。

Since it's not impossible for a major earthquake to happen in this area too, it's better to be prepared.

docs.title: ~ないまでも
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even if not... at least...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
東京大学には合格しないまでも、どこかの国立大学になら受かるだろう。

Even if he doesn't pass Tokyo University, he'll probably get into some national university.

docs.title: ~ながらに/ ながらの
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning while in the state of / traditional...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
涙ながらに謝罪されたら、許さないわけにはいかないでしょう。

If someone apologizes to you in tears, you can't help but forgive them, right?

docs.title: ~なくしては
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning without...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
涙なくしてはこの物語は読めません。

I cannot read this story without crying.

docs.title: ~ならいざしらず
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning A is understandable, but B is not

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
新人ならいざしらず、ベテランがこんなミスをするなんて信じられない。

It might be understandable for a rookie, but I can't believe a veteran would make such a mistake.

docs.title: ~ならでは
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning uniquely applying to / special to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
日本ならではのダンスといえば、盆踊りです。

Speaking of dances unique to Japan, there is the Bon Odori.

docs.title: ~かと思いきや
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning contrary to expectations...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
田中さんは離婚したかと思いきや、数ヶ月で再婚した。

I thought Tanaka-san had gotten divorced, but contrary to my expectations, he remarried a few months later.

docs.title: ~ならではだ/ ならではの
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning unique to / only possible with...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
外国人ならではの目線で、日本の伝統文化を評価してほしい。

I want you to evaluate Japanese traditional culture from a perspective unique to foreigners.

docs.title: ~なり
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as soon as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼女は夫婦仲が悪く、いつも私と会うなり夫の悪口ばかりだ。

Her relationship with her husband is bad, so as soon as she sees me, she just complains about him.

docs.title: ~なりとも
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning at least / even a little

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
浮気したのは確かに悪いが、彼の気持ちも多少なりとも理解できる。

Cheating is certainly bad, but I can understand his feelings at least a little.

docs.title: ~なりに/なりの
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in one's own way / appropriate to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私なりにがんばったつもりだったが、結果は不合格だった。

I thought I tried my best in my own way, but the result was a failure.

docs.title: なんという / なんと / なんて
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning how / what a...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あれほどの地震で死者が一人もでなかったとは、なんという奇跡。

To think that not a single person died in such a massive earthquake, what a miracle!

docs.title: ~に〜ない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning want to but can't...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
土下座までされてしまっては、断るに断れない。

Having someone prostrate themselves before me, I want to refuse but can't.

docs.title: ~に〜を重ねて
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning doing repeatedly / stacking up...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
失敗に失敗を重ね、やっと成功した研究なのです。

This is research that finally succeeded after repeated failures.

docs.title: ~に値する
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning worthy of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
自分勝手な彼がとうとう会社をクビになったが、全く同情に値しない。

Selfish as he is, he finally got fired from the company, but he is completely unworthy of sympathy.

docs.title: ~にあって
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in / during / under the condition of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
社長という立場にあって、この時期に自分だけ休暇を取るわけにはいかない。

In the position of company president, I cannot afford to take a vacation just for myself at this time.

docs.title: ~に至って/至り
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning when it comes to / upon reaching the point of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
商売を始めるに至って、お客様のことを第一に考えることが一番大切だ。

Upon reaching the point of starting a business, putting the customer first is the most important thing.

docs.title: ~可能性がある
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning there's a possibility that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
検査してみましょう。深刻な病気の可能性があります。

Let's do some tests. There is a possibility of a serious illness.

docs.title: ~に至っては
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning when it comes to... (extreme case)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
こんな日本語、日本人でさえ難しいのに、外国人に至っては全く理解できないだろう。

This kind of Japanese is difficult even for Japanese people, so when it comes to foreigners, they probably won't understand it at all.

docs.title: ~に言わせれば
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning if you ask... / according to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
30代なんて、年寄りの私に言わせればまだまだ子供だ。

People in their 30s, if you ask an old person like me, are still just children.

docs.title: ~にかかっては/ にかかったら / にかかると / かかれば
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning if handled by / if it comes to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
どんな肉でも、一流シェフの手にかかっては柔らかくておいしい肉に変わる。

Any kind of meat will turn into tender and delicious meat if handled by a first-class chef.

docs.title: ~に限ったことではない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning not limited to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
高齢化社会は日本に限ったことではない。他の先進国も同じだ。

An aging society is not limited to Japan. Other developed countries are the same.

docs.title: ~にかこつけて
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning using as an excuse / under the pretext of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
出張にかこつけて、各地の観光名所をまわるのが楽しみだ。

I enjoy touring tourist attractions in various places using business trips as an excuse.

docs.title: ~に難くない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning not difficult to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
弁護士になる道のりが厳しいことは想像に難くない。

It is not difficult to imagine that the path to becoming a lawyer is tough.

docs.title: ~にかまけて
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning being too busy with / engrossed in...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
仕事にかまけて、子供と遊ぶ時間も取らなかったことを後悔している。

I regret that I was so engrossed in work that I didn't take time to play with my children.

docs.title: ~に先駆けて
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning prior to / ahead of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この映画は、世界に先駆けて日本で上映されます。

This movie will be screened in Japan ahead of the rest of the world.

docs.title: ~にしたところで/にしたって
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even if... / even for...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今さらタバコをやめるにしたところで、健康になるとは限らない。

Even if you quit smoking now, it doesn't necessarily mean you'll become healthy.

docs.title: ~にして
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning only at / even at / precisely because...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
5回目にして、やっと司法試験に合格した。

Only at the 5th attempt did I finally pass the bar exam.

docs.title: ~が早いか
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as soon as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
チャイムがなるが早いか、教室を飛び出していった。

As soon as the chime rang, they dashed out of the classroom.

docs.title: ~に忍びない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning cannot bring oneself to / bear to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今までもらったプレゼントを全部捨てるに忍びないから、売ってしまおうか。

I can't bear to throw away all the presents I've received so far, so maybe I should sell them?

docs.title: ~に即して / に即した
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in line with / according to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
時代に即して考えを変えないと、若者の理解は得られません。

If we don't change our thinking in line with the times, we won't gain the understanding of young people.

docs.title: ~に堪えない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning unbearable to / not worth...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あまりにひどい悪口で、聞くに堪えない。

The insults are so terrible that they are unbearable to listen to.

docs.title: ~に足る/に足らない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning worthy of / not worthy of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
そんな話は取るに足らない。相手にするな。

Such a story is not worth considering. Don't engage with it.

docs.title: ~に照らして
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in light of / according to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
常識に照らして考えれば、彼の行動は大人のものとは思えない。

In light of common sense, his actions cannot be considered those of an adult.

docs.title: ~にとどまらず
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning not limited to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
強風にとどまらず、雨まで降ってきた。

Not limited to strong winds, it even started to rain.

docs.title: ~に則って
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in accordance with / following...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
寮では、ここのルールに則って生活してください。

In the dorm, please live in accordance with the rules here.

docs.title: ~には当たらない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning not worth / no need to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
よくあるミスなので、対応できます。心配には当たりませんよ。

It's a common mistake, so we can handle it. There's no need to worry.

docs.title: ~には及ばない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning no need to / no match for...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ファッションセンスに関しては、姉には全く及ばない。

When it comes to fashion sense, I am no match for my older sister.

docs.title: ~には無理がある
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning unreasonable to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この量の仕事を明日まで仕上げるには無理がありますよ。

It is unreasonable to finish this amount of work by tomorrow.

docs.title: ~がましい
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning sounds like / looks like (negative nuance)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
一年前に別れた彼女に連絡するなんて、未練がましいよ。

Contacting a girlfriend you broke up with a year ago looks like you're clinging to the past.

docs.title: ~にひきかえ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in contrast to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
よくできる兄にひきかえ、弟の私は何をやってもうまくいかない。

In contrast to my capable older brother, I, the younger brother, fail at whatever I do.

docs.title: ~にもほどがある
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning there is a limit to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あれもこれも気に入らないなんて、わがままにもほどがある。

Not liking this or that... there's a limit to how selfish you can be.

docs.title: ~にも増して
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning more than ever / even more than...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今年の夏は例年にも増して暑い。熱中症にならないように気をつけて。

This summer is even hotter than usual years. Be careful not to get heatstroke.

docs.title: ~によるところが大きい
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning largely due to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
高校野球のチームの強さは、監督によるところが大きい。

The strength of a high school baseball team is largely due to its manager.

docs.title: ~の至り
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning the height of / utmost...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
若気の至りで19歳のときに最初の結婚をした。

In the height of youthful indiscretion, I got married for the first time at 19.

docs.title: ~の極み
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning the ultimate / extreme of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
高級ホテルで好きなように数日過ごし、ぜいたくの極みだった。

Spending a few days at a luxury hotel doing whatever I wanted was the ultimate luxury.

docs.title: ~のも無理はない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning it's no wonder that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
デートで浮気相手とはちあわせ、そりゃ彼女にふられるのも無理はない。

Running into his cheating partner on a date... it's no wonder he got dumped by his girlfriend.

docs.title: ~のをいいことに
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning taking advantage of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼は誰も見ていないのをいいことに、仕事中ずっと寝ていたんです。

Taking advantage of the fact that no one was watching, he slept throughout work.

docs.title: ~は~てのことだ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning is because of... / thanks to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
無事に第一希望の大学に合格できたのは、先生の教えがあってのことだ。

Being able to safely pass my first-choice university is all thanks to my teacher's instruction.

docs.title: ~はおろか
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning let alone / not to mention...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今のままでは大学はおろか、短大に入るのさえ難しいですよ。

As it is now, it will be difficult to even get into a junior college, let alone a university.

docs.title: ~からある / からする/ からの
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as much as / as many as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
婚約に際し、彼から300万円からする指輪が贈られた。

Upon our engagement, he gave me a ring worth as much as 3 million yen.

docs.title: ~ばこそ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning precisely because...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
健康であればこそ、おいしいものも食べられる。

Precisely because you are healthy, you can eat delicious food.

docs.title: ~はさておき
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning setting aside...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
年齢はさておき、実力はあるようですので彼女を採用するべきです。

Setting aside her age, she seems to have real ability, so we should hire her.

docs.title: ~ばそれまでだ/たらそれまでだ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning that's the end of it / it's all over if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
辛くても生きなさい。死んだらそれまでですよ。

Live even if it's tough. If you die, that's the end of it.

docs.title: ~羽目になる
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning end up in a bad situation...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
傘を電車に忘れてしまって、ぬれて帰る羽目になった。

I forgot my umbrella on the train and ended up having to go home wet.

docs.title: ~ぶる
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning act like / pretend to be...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼女はいい人ぶっているが、陰で人の悪口ばかり言ってるよ。

She pretends to be a good person, but she just speaks ill of people behind their backs.

docs.title: ~べからず / べからざる
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning must not / should not...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
治療を放棄するとは、医者べからざる態度。

Abandoning treatment is an attitude unbecoming of a doctor.

docs.title: ~べく
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in order to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
金メダルを取るべく、毎日朝から晩まで練習ばかりしている。

In order to win a gold medal, I do nothing but practice from morning to night every day.

docs.title: ~べくして
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning inevitably / as expected...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
対策もなにもなかったため、この事件は起こるべくして起こったと言える。

Because there were no countermeasures, it can be said that this incident was bound to happen.

docs.title: ~かれ〜かれ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning sooner or later / more or less

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
毎日けんかしてるんだから、遅かれ早かれ離婚するでしょうね。

Since they fight every day, they'll get divorced sooner or later.

docs.title: ~べくもない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning cannot possibly...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
幼いことから目立っていた彼がプロ選手になるのは、疑うべくもない。

It is beyond doubt that he, who stood out from a young age, would become a pro player.

docs.title: ~放題
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as much as one wants / leaving unchecked

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ケーキ食べ放題プラン、一人二時間で3000円です。

The all-you-can-eat cake plan is 3000 yen per person for two hours.

docs.title: ~まくる
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning do relentlessly / do extensively...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
仕事でミスをしまくって、上司にひどく怒られた。

I made mistake after mistake at work and got severely scolded by my boss.

docs.title: ~まじき
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning should not / must not be done

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
カンニングを手助けするなんて、教師にあるまじき行為だ。

Helping someone cheat is an act unworthy of a teacher.

docs.title: ~までだ/までのことだ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning only / just... (no other reason)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私の意見を正直に言ったまでです。文句を言われても困ります。

I merely stated my opinion honestly. I'd be troubled if you complain about it.

docs.title: ~までもない/までもなく
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning no need to / goes without saying...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このくらいの風邪なら、薬を飲むまでもないですよ。

For a cold of this level, there's no need to take medicine.

docs.title: ~まみれ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning covered in / completely stained with (negative)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
手が血まみれですが、一体何があったんですか。

Your hands are covered in blood; what on earth happened?

docs.title: ~めく / めいて / めいた
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning showing signs of / starting to look like...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
空気も暖かくなり、ようやく春めいてきましたね。

The air has gotten warmer, and it's finally starting to feel like spring.

docs.title: ~もさることながら
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning not only... but also...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
その漫画は絵もさることながら、ストーリーもすばらしくて目が離せない。

Not only is the art in that manga great, but the story is also wonderful and keeps you hooked.

docs.title: ~きっての
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning the best / the most in a particular group

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この学校きっての秀才の彼は、きっと東京の大学に行くんだろう。

He is the brightest student in this school, so he will surely go to a university in Tokyo.

docs.title: ~も同然だ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning virtually the same as / practically...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
相手チームのエースがけが？じゃあ、今日の試合は勝ったも同然だな。

The opposing team's ace is injured? Then today's match is practically won.

docs.title: ~ものと思われる / ものと見られる
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning it is thought that / it seems that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
まだコーヒーが温かいので、さっきまでここにいたものと思われます。

The coffee is still warm, so it is thought that they were here until just a moment ago.

docs.title: ~ものを
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning should have / if only...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
言ってくれれば手伝ったものを。

If only you had told me, I would have helped.

docs.title: もはや
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning already / no longer...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このような弱い薬は、もはや私には効かないんです。

Such a weak medicine is no longer effective on me.

docs.title: ~や否や
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as soon as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
起きるや否や、スマホでSNSのチェックをしている。

As soon as I wake up, I check my SNS on my smartphone.

docs.title: やれ〜やれ〜
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning what with... and...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
やれ塾だ、やれスポーツクラブだと、最近の子供は大人より忙しい。

What with cram school and sports clubs, children these days are busier than adults.

docs.title: ~故に/故の / 故だ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning because of / due to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
お母さんはあなたを愛しているが故に、厳しく叱るんですよ。

Your mother scolds you strictly precisely because she loves you.

docs.title: ~ようが/ようと
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even if / no matter what...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
どんなに反対されようが、私は彼と結婚します。

No matter how much I am opposed, I will marry him.

docs.title: ~ようにも〜ない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even if one wanted to, one cannot...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
話を聞こうにも、泣いてちゃ聞けないよ。

Even if I wanted to hear the story, I can't if you're crying.

docs.title: ~ようによっては/ようでは
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning depending on how you look at it / depending on the method...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼に浮気されて別れたことも、考えようによってはよかったのかも。

Breaking up with him because he cheated might have been a good thing, depending on how you look at it.

docs.title: ~きらいがある
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning have a tendency to (negative)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
父は、たとえ一大事でも一人で解決しようとするきらいがある。

My father has a tendency to try and solve things on his own, even in a major crisis.

docs.title: ~わ~わ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning what with... and... (usually negative pile-up)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
昨日は1日、甥と姪の面倒を見たが、騒ぐわ泣くわで大変だった。

I took care of my nephew and niece all day yesterday, and what with the making noise and crying, it was exhausting.

docs.title: ~をおいて他にない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning none other than / only...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
哲学について学びたいなら、中田教授のいるこの大学をおいて他にない。

If you want to study philosophy, there is no other place than this university where Professor Nakata is.

docs.title: ~を押して / を押し切って
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning overcoming / pushing past (opposition, illness)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
周囲の反対を押し切って結婚したものの、二年で離婚した。

Although they pushed past the opposition of those around them to marry, they divorced in two years.

docs.title: ~を顧みず / も顧みず
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning without considering / disregarding...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
自分の危険も顧みず、子供を救うために川に飛び込んだ。

Disregarding his own danger, he jumped into the river to save the child.

docs.title: ~を限りに
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as the last / starting from...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今日を限りに、もうお酒は一滴も飲まないことにする。

With today as the last, I've decided not to drink even a single drop of alcohol.

docs.title: ~をかねて
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning also for the purpose of / combined with...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
親孝行をかねて、家族みんなで温泉旅行にでも行くつもりだ。

I plan to go on a hot spring trip with the whole family, also to show filial piety.

docs.title: ~を皮切りに
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning starting with...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
渋谷のこの店を皮切りに、全国に店を出していく予定だ。

Starting with this store in Shibuya, we plan to open stores nationwide.

docs.title: ~を機に
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning taking the opportunity of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
病気になったのを機に、健康的な生活をするようになりました。

Taking the opportunity of getting sick, I started living a healthy lifestyle.

docs.title: ~を禁じ得ない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning cannot help but...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このドラマのラストは涙を禁じ得ない。

I cannot help but shed tears at the end of this drama.

docs.title: ~を境に
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning with... as the turning point

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
旅行に行ってきたのを境に、英語を猛勉強するようになった。

With the trip as a turning point, I started studying English intensely.

docs.title: ~きりがない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning endless / no end to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
結婚相手の条件をあげたらきりがないんです。

There is no end to listing the conditions for a marriage partner.

docs.title: ~を控えて
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in preparation for / facing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
オリンピックの開幕を控えて、競技場の完成が急がれている。

Facing the opening of the Olympics, the completion of the stadium is being rushed.

docs.title: ~を踏まえて
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning based on / taking into account...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今回の試験結果を踏まえて、目指す大学のレベルを少し落とした。

Based on the results of this exam, I slightly lowered the level of the university I'm aiming for.

docs.title: ~を経て
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning through / after experiencing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
辛く厳しい修行を経て、やっと自分の店を持つことができた。

After experiencing tough and rigorous training, I was finally able to have my own shop.

docs.title: ~をもって/ をもちまして
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as of / by means of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
当店は3月31日をもって、閉店いたします。

Our store will close as of March 31st.

docs.title: ~をものともせずに
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning without being deterred by...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
プレッシャーをものともせずに、余裕の演技で優勝した。

Without being deterred by the pressure, they won with a composed performance.

docs.title: ~を余儀なくされる
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning be forced to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
部下の不祥事により、辞職を余儀なくされた。

Due to a subordinate's scandal, he was forced to resign.

docs.title: ~をよそに
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning indifferent to / disregarding...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
周囲の心配をよそに、彼は自分の信じる道を突き進んでいる。

Disregarding the worries of those around him, he pushes forward on the path he believes in.

docs.title: 〜んがために
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in order to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
金メダルを取らんがために、ライバルより1分でも長く練習する。

In order to win a gold medal, I practice even one minute longer than my rivals.

docs.title: 〜んばかりに
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as if to / almost...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
頭が割れんばかりにひどい頭痛が続いている。

A severe headache, as if my head is going to split, continues.

docs.title: 極まりない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning extremely...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
夜中にバイクで走り回るとは、迷惑極まりない行動だ。

Riding around on a motorcycle in the middle of the night is an extremely annoying behavior.

docs.title: ~くらいのものだ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning only...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
娘が電話をかけてくるのは、お小遣いが足りないときくらいのものだ。

The only time my daughter calls me is when she is short on allowance money.

docs.title: ~ぐるみ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning the whole / including...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
田中さんとは家族ぐるみの付き合いだ。

I have a relationship with Mr. Tanaka that includes our whole families.

docs.title: ~こそ〜が/けれど
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning although X, Y is true

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
部長は話し方こそ怖いが、実はとてもいい人なんです。

Although the manager's way of speaking is scary, he is actually a very nice person.

docs.title: こそあれ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning although there is...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
小さなミスこそあれ、ほとんど完璧な仕事をするのは彼女しかいない。

Although she makes small mistakes, she is the only one who does almost perfect work.

docs.title: こそすれ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning only... and never...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
年々、顔のしわは増えこそすれ、なくなることはありません。

Year by year, facial wrinkles only increase; they never disappear.

docs.title: ~ごとく
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning like / as if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
真夏に外で作業すると、汗が滝のごとく流れ落ちる。

When working outside in midsummer, sweat pours down like a waterfall.

docs.title: ~ことこの上ない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning nothing more... than...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
第一志望の大学に合格し、うれしいことこの上ない。

I passed my first-choice university, and there is nothing I am happier about.

docs.title: 〜ことだし
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning since...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
天気もいいことだし、どこかに遊びに行こうかな。

Since the weather is nice, maybe I'll go hang out somewhere.

docs.title: ~こととて
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning because...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
10年前のこととて、記憶があいまいである。

Because it was 10 years ago, my memory is vague.

docs.title: ことなしに
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning without doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
努力することなしに成功しようったって、そう簡単なもんじゃない。

Trying to succeed without putting in effort is not that simple.

docs.title: ~ことのないように
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning so as not to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
子供に不自由な生活をさせることのないように、一生懸命働く。

I work hard so as not to let my children lead an uncomfortable life.

docs.title: ~こともあって
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning partly because...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
久しぶりに会ったこともあって、話しても話し足りなかった。

Partly because we hadn't seen each other in a long time, we couldn't talk enough.

docs.title: ~さ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning (strong assertion/certainty)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
気にすることないさ。明日には課長の機嫌も治っているさ。

There's nothing to worry about. The section chief's mood will surely be better tomorrow.

docs.title: ~さぞ/ さぞかし
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning must be / surely...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今日は飲まず食わずだったとか。さぞお腹が空いているでしょう。

I heard you haven't eaten or drunk anything today. You must be starving.

docs.title: ~さも
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼はさも自分一人で作ったかのように話しているが、チームで作ったんだよ。

He speaks as if he made it all by himself, but it was made by the team.

docs.title: ~始末だ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning end up doing (negative result)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
遅刻したと思ったら、仕事中に居眠りまでする始末だ。

Just when I thought him being late was bad enough, he even ends up falling asleep during work.

docs.title: ~じみる / じみた
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning looks like / seems like (usually negative)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
父は、アドバイスと言いながら、説教じみた話をする。

My father gives talks that seem like lectures while calling them advice.

docs.title: ~ずくめ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning entirely / completely covered in...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
防犯カメラに写っているのは黒ずくめの男だった。

The person caught on the security camera was a man dressed entirely in black.

docs.title: ~ずじまい
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning ended up not doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
せっかく近くまで来たのに彼とは時間が合わず、会えずじまいだった。

Even though I came all the way to his neighborhood, our schedules didn't match and I ended up not seeing him.

docs.title: ~ずとも
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning without doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼なら勉強せずとも合格点ぐらいは取れるだろうね。

He could probably get a passing score even without studying.

docs.title: ~ずにはおかない / ないではおかない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning certainly will / cannot help but...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
そのドキュメンタリー映画は、環境問題を考えさせずにはおかない。

That documentary film will certainly make you think about environmental issues.

docs.title: ~ずには済まない / ないでは済まない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning must do / can't get away without doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
そんなに大きなミスでは、取引先までいって謝らないでは済まないだろう。

With a mistake that big, you won't be able to get away without going to the client and apologizing.

docs.title: ~術がない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning no way to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私はあなたに頼るしかもう術がないんです。

I have no other way but to rely on you.

docs.title: ~すら/ ですら
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
調子が悪くてベットから起きることすらできません。

I feel so unwell that I can't even get out of bed.

docs.title: ~ぞ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning (strong assertion)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
頑張るぞ！

I'm going to do my best!

docs.title: ~損なう / 損ねる
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning miss out on / fail to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
会議が長引いて、昼食を食べ損なった。

The meeting ran long, and I missed out on eating lunch.

docs.title: ~そっちのけで
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning ignoring / setting aside...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
勉強そっちのけで、彼女とデートばかりしている。

He ignores his studies and just goes on dates with his girlfriend all the time.

docs.title: ~そばから
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as soon as (repeatedly)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
漢字が苦手で、覚えたそばから忘れてしまう。

I'm bad at kanji; I forget them as soon as I memorize them.

docs.title: ~そびれる
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning miss the chance to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ガソリンを入れそびれて、なくならないかヒヤヒヤしている。

I missed the chance to get gas, and now I'm nervously worrying it might run out.

docs.title: ~たが最後/たら最後
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning if... then absolutely...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
転勤になったら最後、最低でも3年は日本に帰ってこられない。

Once I get transferred, I absolutely won't be able to return to Japan for at least three years.

docs.title: ただ〜のみだ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning only / just...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
強くなりたいなら、ただ練習するのみだ。

If you want to become strong, you just have to practice.

docs.title: ~たつもりはない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning didn't mean to / have no intention of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あなたのことを批判したつもりはありません。個人の意見を言ったまでです。

I didn't mean to criticize you. I was just stating my personal opinion.

docs.title: ~たところで
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even if / just when...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
家に帰ったところで会社から電話が来た。

Just as I got home, I received a phone call from the company.

docs.title: ~だに / だにしない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even just doing / not even...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
津波が来ることを考えるだに恐ろしい。

Even just thinking about a tsunami coming is terrifying.

docs.title: ~だの〜だの
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning things like... and...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
アイスだの、ケーキだの、そんなのばっかり食べてるから太るんだ。

You gain weight because you only eat things like ice cream and cake.

docs.title: ~た弾みに/た拍子に
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning in the momentum of / just as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
転んだ拍子に頭をぶつけて意識不明になった。

Just as I fell, I hit my head and lost consciousness.

docs.title: ~ためしがない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning never once...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
宝くじをもう20年も買ってるが、当たったためしがない。

I've been buying lottery tickets for 20 years, but I've never won once.

docs.title: ~たら〜たで
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning if... then...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
お金があったらあったで、別の悩みや苦労があるんですよ。

If you have money, you just have different kinds of worries and struggles.

docs.title: ~たら〜ところだ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning would have been / was about to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
警察につかまるなんて、父が生きていたら殴られてるところだ。

Getting caught by the police—if my father were alive, I would have been beaten for this.

docs.title: ~たらしい/ったらしい
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning too much / annoying...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あの子ばかりえこひいきされて、憎たらしい。

It's annoying how much that child is shown favoritism.

docs.title: ~たりとも
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning not even...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あなたに渡すお金なんて、1円たりともありません。

I don't have even a single yen to give to you.

docs.title: ~たるもの
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning as a...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
医者たるもの、何に変えても患者の命を優先すべきだ。

As a doctor, one should prioritize the patient's life over anything else.

docs.title: ~だろうに
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even though / despite...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
仕事で疲れているだろうに、毎日手料理を作ってくれる母に感謝だ。

I am grateful to my mother who cooks homemade meals every day, even though she must be tired from work.

docs.title: ~つ~つ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning doing... and doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
レースは抜きつ抜かれつ、最後まで結果がわからなかった。

In the race, they kept passing and being passed, and the result was unknown until the very end.

docs.title: ~尽くす
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning exhaust / do entirely...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼女の家に行ったら、食べ尽くせないほどの料理が並んでいた。

When I went to her house, there was an inexhaustible amount of food laid out.

docs.title: ってば/ったら
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning I'm telling you! / (emphasis)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
本当だってば、信じよ。

It's the truth, I'm telling you! Believe me.

docs.title: であれ/であろうと
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even if / no matter what

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
どんな理由であれ、法律を守らなかったらつかまるんだよ。

No matter the reason, you will get caught if you don't follow the law.

docs.title: ~て敵わない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning can't stand / unbearably...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
いくら赤ちゃんでも一晩中泣かれてはうるさくて敵わない。

Even if it's a baby, I can't stand how loud it is being cried at all night long.

docs.title: ~てからというもの
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning ever since...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
子供が生まれてからというもの、自分の時間が全くない。

Ever since my child was born, I have absolutely no time for myself.

docs.title: ~てしかるべきだ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning it's only natural that / should...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
子供は大人の言うことを聞いてしかるべきだ。

It is only natural that children should listen to what adults say.

docs.title: ~て済むことではない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning won't be resolved just by...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
人をけがさせておいて、謝って済むことではないのはわかってますか。

Do you understand that injuring someone is not something that can be resolved just by apologizing?

docs.title: ~でなくてなんだろう
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning if this isn't X, what is it?

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼を見るとドキドキする。これが恋でなくてなんなんだろう。

My heart pounds when I see him. If this isn't love, what is it?

docs.title: ~ではあるまいし / でもあるまいし
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning it's not as if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
子供ではあるまいし、自分のことは自分でしなさい。

It's not like you're a child, so take care of your own things.

docs.title: ~では済まない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning can't get away with just...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
部下が問題を起こしたら、上司もただでは済まないよ。

If a subordinate causes a problem, the boss won't get away unscathed either.

docs.title: ~手前
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning considering / out of consideration for...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
絶対に勝つと言った手前、負けるわけにはいかない。

Considering I said I would absolutely win, I cannot afford to lose.

docs.title: ~てみせる
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning I'll show you that I can...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私は超能力者です。あなたの心の中を私が読んでみせましょう。

I am a psychic. I will show you that I can read your mind.

docs.title: ~(で)もあり~(で)もある
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning is both... and...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今日は私の誕生日でもあり、結婚記念日でもある。

Today is both my birthday and my wedding anniversary.

docs.title: ~ても差し支えない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning it's okay to / doesn't matter if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
新人が今日の会議に参加できなくても差し支えない。

It doesn't matter if the new employee can't attend today's meeting.

docs.title: ~ても知らない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning I don't care if / it's your own fault if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
真面目に授業にも出ないて、卒業できなくても知らないよ。

If you don't attend classes seriously and can't graduate, it's your own fault.

docs.title: ~てもどうにもならない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning it's no use even if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
才能が全くなければ、いくら努力してもどうにもならない。

If you have absolutely no talent, it's no use no matter how much effort you put in.

docs.title: ~でも何でもない / くも何ともない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning not at all...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
好きでも何でもない人からプレゼントをもらっても困るだけだ。

Receiving a present from someone I don't even like at all is just troubling.

docs.title: ~てやまない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning sincerely / from the bottom of one's heart...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
多くの親は子供の幸せを願ってやまない。

Many parents sincerely wish for their children's happiness.

docs.title: ~と相まって
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning coupled with / together with...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
個性的なドレスと相まって、彼女の独特な魅力が引き立った。

Coupled with the unique dress, her distinct charm stood out.

docs.title: ~とあって
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning because of the special situation...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
超人気アイドルとあって、彼はすぐに大勢のファンに取り囲まれた。

Because he is a super popular idol, he was immediately surrounded by a large crowd of fans.

docs.title: ~とあれば
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning if it's for / if it's the case...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あなたの頼みとあれば、何だってします。

If it's a request from you, I will do anything.

docs.title: ~といい~といい
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning both... and...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
田中といい、鈴木といい、何で最近の新人はすぐに辞めてしまうのか。

Both Tanaka and Suzuki... Why do recent new employees quit so quickly?

docs.title: ~という
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning all / every single one

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
長期連休ということで、道という道が混んでいる。

Because of the long holiday, every single road is crowded.

docs.title: ~というところだ / といったところだ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning at most / around...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ここからだと駅までは歩いて5分というところですね。

From here, it's about a 5-minute walk to the station at most.

docs.title: ~というもの
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning for a long time / during this period...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ここ一週間というもの、雨が降り続いて洪水が起きた地域もある。

For the past week, it has kept raining, and there are even areas where floods have occurred.

docs.title: ~といえども
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning even if / even though...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
息子といえども、ここまで無能だと社長にさせるわけにはいかない。

Even if he is my son, if he is this incompetent, I cannot let him become the president.

docs.title: ~と言えなくもない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning it could be said that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
8割の確率で作ることができれば、成功と言えなくもない。

If we can make it with an 80% success rate, it could be said to be a success.

docs.title: ~といったところだ
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning at most / exactly like...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この仕事が終わるのは、あと2時間といったところだ。

It will take about 2 hours at most for this job to be finished.

docs.title: ~といったらない / といったらありゃしない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning incredibly / nothing is more...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
スマホを忘れただけなのに、一日中不便といったらなかった。

Even though I just forgot my smartphone, it was incredibly inconvenient all day.

docs.title: ~といわず~といわず
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning not distinguishing between A and B / everywhere

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
食事中といわず、寝る前といわず、どこでもスマホを離さない。

Whether during meals or before bed, they never let go of their smartphone anywhere.

docs.title: ~ときたら
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning when it comes to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
うちの娘ときたら、勉強もせずゲームばかりしてるんですよ。

When it comes to my daughter, she doesn't study and just plays games all the time.

docs.title: ~ところ / ところを
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning at a time when...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
お忙しいところ大変失礼いたします。

I apologize for disturbing you at such a busy time.

docs.title: ~としたことが
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning of all people / for someone like...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私としたことが、こんな簡単な問題を間違えるなんて。

To think that someone like me would make a mistake on such a simple problem.

docs.title: ~として〜ない
docs.text: Level N1 Meaning not even one...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今回の授業には、誰一人として欠席しなかった。

Not even one person was absent from this class.

docs.title: N2 — Upper Intermediate Grammar Patterns
docs.text: Pattern Meaning ~ものの/とはいうものの Although... ~にもかかわらず Despite... ~ながら(も) Even while / although... ~つつ(も) Even though / despite (doing) ~にかかわらず/にかかわりなく Regardless of... ~からといって/からって Just because... ~にしても/にしろ/にせよ Even if... ~かのようだ/かのように As if... ~げ Seems like / looks like... ~ばかりに Simply because (negative consequence)... ~につき Due to / per... ~あまり So much... that... ~ものだから Because... (excuse/reason) ~のことだから Since it is... (expectations based on a person's nature) ~ことから From the fact that... ~からには、からは、以上は、上は Now that / since... ~ところをみると Judging from... ~だけに/~だけあって As expected / precisely because... ~ことだし Since... / seeing as... ~てこそ Only by doing... あまりの〜に Because it was too... ~ものなら/~もんなら If it were possible... ~ないことには〜ない Unless... ~さえ〜ば As long as / if only... ~ようものなら If one were to do... (leads to bad result) ~となると When it comes to... / If it comes to that... ~にしても〜にしても/~にしろ〜にしろ/~にせよ〜にせよ Whether... or... ~に基づいて、をもとに(して) Based on... ~のもと(で) Under (supervision/influence)... ~に沿って Along with / in accordance with... ~どころか Far from... 一方で On the other hand... ~に反して Contrary to... ~というより Rather than... ~だけまし At least / it's better than... 〜くらいなら Rather than (do X, I would do Y) ~ざるをえない Have no choice but to... ~て(は)いられない Cannot afford to... ~ないではいられない Can't help but... ~てならない Cannot help feeling / unbelievably... ~にほかならない Nothing but... ~というものだ Is exactly what is meant by... ~にすぎない Nothing more than... ~(より)ほかない Have no choice but to... ~おそれがある There is a risk that... ~かねない Might (bad consequence)... ~に相違ない Without a doubt... ~とか I heard that... ~やら〜やら Things like... and... ~といった Such as... ~というか〜というか Or rather... / I'm not sure if it's A or B... ~抜きで/~抜きにして Without... ~ことなく Without (doing)... ~をこめて Filled with (emotion)... ~に限り Only for... ~に限って Particularly... / Of all things... ~限り(は) As long as... ~限りでは As far as... ~どころではない Not the time/place for... ~ものか I'll never... 〜っこない There's no way that... ~わけがない It is impossible that... ~というものではない/~というものでもない It doesn't necessarily mean... ~のみならず(~も) Not only... ~に限らず Not limited to... ~はもとより(~も) Not only... but of course... ~うえに In addition to... ~も~ば、〜も Both... and... ~を問わず Regardless of... ~もかまわず Without caring about... ~はともかく(として) Putting aside... ~はさておき Aside from... ~をめぐって Over / concerning... ~に応えて/~に応える In response to... ~をはじめ/~をはじめとして Starting with... / including... ~限り As far as / until the end... ~からして Judging from... ~にわたって Throughout / over a period of... ~だけ As much as... ~ものだ It's natural that / one should... ~ものではない One should not... ~ことだ Should / ought to... ~反面 On the other hand... ~だけのことはある No wonder / it shows... ~うる/~える/~えない Can / cannot possibly... ~がたい Hard to... ~ようがない There is no way to... ~かねる Cannot (do something politely)... ~たきり Since (doing) / nothing but... ~あげく In the end / finally (after a long process)... ~末(に) At the end of / finally... ~ずじまい Ended up not doing... ~次第だ Depending on / the reason is... ~抜く To do to the end... ~にともなって/~にともない/~にともなう Along with... ~につれて As... then... ~かいあって/~かいもなく Thanks to the effort of... / despite the effort of... ~つつある Is currently (doing)... ~一方だ Tends to / just keeps... ~ばかりだ Just keeps (usually bad direction)... ~に応じて According to / corresponding to... ~につけ/~につけて Every time... ~を契機に/~を契機にして As an opportunity... ~をきっかけに With X as a start... ~ようではないか Let's do... ~次第で Depending on... ~までして/~てまで Even to the point of... ~てでも Even if I have to... ~てこそ Now that / only because... ~として〜ない Not even one... ~からすると/~からすれば/~からいうと/~からいえば/~からいって Judging from... ~を~として/~を~とする As / deciding on... ~にしてみたら/~にしてみれば From the perspective of... ~にあたって/~にあたり At the time of... ~際に(は) In the case of... ~つつ While doing... ~折に(は) When taking the opportunity... ~に際して When / on the occasion of... ~か~ないかのうちに Right after / barely... ~かと思うと/~かと思ったら As soon as... ~次第 As soon as... ~て以来/~てこのかた Ever since... ~に先立ち/~に先立って Before / prior to... ~うえで After doing... ~にかけては When it comes to... ~とは The definition of X is... ということは That means... ~まい Must not / won't... ~ようか〜まいか Whether or not... ~つもり Conviction / intention... ~ものがある There is a feeling of... ~ことに To my (surprise, disappointment, etc.)... ~ことか How much... ~ないものか I wonder if... ~たいものだ I really want to...

docs.title: ~ものの/とはいうものの
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Although...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
車はあるものの、ほとんど運転しない

Although I have a car, I rarely drive it.

docs.title: ~にもかかわらず
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Despite...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
雨にもかかわらず、たくさんの人が参加した

Many people participated despite the rain.

docs.title: ~ながら(も)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Even while / although...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
体に悪いと知りながらも、タバコは止められない。

I know that smoking is bad for the body, but I can't quit.

docs.title: ~つつ(も)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Even though / despite (doing)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
やめようと思いつつ、ついお酒を飲みすぎてしまう

I try to stop, but I end up drinking too much.

docs.title: ~にかかわらず/にかかわりなく
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Regardless of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
年れいにかかわらず、優秀なら合格しますよ。

Regardless of your age, if you are good enough, you will be accepted.

docs.title: ~からといって/からって
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Just because...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
日本に住んでいるからといって、日本語が話せるようになるわけではない。

Just because you live in Japan does not mean you will be able to speak Japanese.

docs.title: ~にしても/にしろ/にせよ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Even if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
忙しかったにしても、電話ぐらいはできたでしょう?

I understand that you were busy, but you could have at least made a phone call, couldn't you?

docs.title: ~かのようだ/かのように
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
姉は、私の子を自分の子どもであるかのようにかわいがってくれる

My sister loves my child as if he/she was her own.

docs.title: ~げ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Seems like / looks like...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あそこで一人で立っている子は、悲しげな顔をしている

The child standing alone there has a sad look on his face.

docs.title: ~ばかりに
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Simply because (negative consequence)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
バスで来たばかりに、遅刻してしまった

I was late because I came by bus.

docs.title: ~ばかりだ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Just keeps (usually bad direction)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
悪いうわさは止められない。広がるばかりだ

You can't stop bad rumors, they just spread.

docs.title: ~に応じて
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning According to / corresponding to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
お客様のリクエストに応じて、新しいメニューを作ります。

We create new menus according to the requests of our customers.

docs.title: ~につけ/~につけて
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Every time...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼の顔を見るにつけ、負けた時のことを思い出してくやしい。

Every time I look at his face, I remember the time I lost and feel frustrated.

docs.title: ~を契機に/~を契機にして
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As an opportunity...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
退職を契機に、田舎で農業をすることにした。

When I retired, I decided to start farming in the countryside.

docs.title: ~をきっかけに
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning With X as a start...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ある映画をきっかけに、日本文化に興味を持ち始めた

One movie sparked my interest in Japanese culture.

docs.title: ~ようではないか
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Let's do...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
1年間もかけたこのプロジェクト、ぜひ成功させようではないか

We have spent a year on this project, so let's make it a success.

docs.title: ~次第で
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Depending on...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あなたの努力次第で、合格するかどうか決まります。

Your efforts will determine whether you pass or not.

docs.title: ~までして/~てまで
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Even to the point of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
いくらおいしくても、並ぶまでして食べたくはない

No matter how delicious it is, I don't want to stand in line to eat it.

docs.title: ~てでも
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Even if I have to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あの歌手のコンサートなら、10万円払ってでも行きたい

I would pay 100,000 yen to go to that singer's concert.

docs.title: ~てこそ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Now that / only because...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
自分で働いてこそ、お金の大切さがわかるというものです。

Only by working for yourself can you understand the importance of money.

docs.title: ~につき
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Due to / per...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
本日は日曜日につき、休業いたします。

It's Sunday, so we're closed.

docs.title: ~として〜ない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Not even one...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私は学生時代、1日として学校を欠席したことはない。

I never missed a day of school while I was a student.

docs.title: ~からすると/~からすれば/~からいうと/~からいえば/~からいって
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Judging from...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
学生からすると、大学の学費は高すぎる。

University tuition is too expensive for a student.

docs.title: ~を~として/~を~とする
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As / deciding on...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ダイエット中なので、ナッツを昼ごはんとして食べています。

I am on a diet, so I eat nuts for lunch.

docs.title: ~にしてみたら/~にしてみれば
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning From the perspective of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私はもう40歳だが、母にしてみればまだかわいい子どもだ

I'm forty years old now, but to my mother, I'm still a cute little kid.

docs.title: ~にあたって/~にあたり
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning At the time of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
留学するにあたって、必要なビザを取得しました。

I have obtained the necessary visa to study abroad.

docs.title: ~際に(は)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning In the case of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
お帰りの際には、足元にお気をつけください。

Please watch your step when you leave.

docs.title: ~つつ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning While doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
晩ごはんを作りつつ、子どもの宿題も見てやる。

I cook dinner while also helping my kids with their homework.

docs.title: ~折に(は)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning When taking the opportunity...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
東京にいらっしゃった折には、ぜひわが社にもお立ち寄りください。

If you are ever in Tokyo, please stop by our office.

docs.title: ~に際して
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning When / on the occasion of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
購入に際して、店員から詳しい説明を受けた。

The clerk gave me a detailed explanation on the purchase.

docs.title: ~か~ないかのうちに
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Right after / barely...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
店が開くか開かないかのうちに、人気商品は全部売り切れた

As soon as the store opened, all the popular items were sold out.

docs.title: ~あまり
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning So much... that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
驚きのあまり、心臓が止まりそうになった

I was so surprised that my heart almost stopped.

docs.title: ~かと思うと/~かと思ったら
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As soon as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
空が暗くなったかと思ったら、雨が降り出した

As soon as the sky darkened, it started to rain.

docs.title: ~次第
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As soon as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
スケジュールが決まり次第、ご連絡いたします。

We will contact you as soon as the schedule is finalized.

docs.title: ~て以来/~てこのかた
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Ever since...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あの歌を聴いて以来、頭から離れない

I haven't been able to get that song out of my head since I heard it.

docs.title: ~に先立ち/~に先立って
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Before / prior to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
海外旅行に先立ち、新しいクレジットカードを作りました

I made a new credit card prior to my trip abroad.

docs.title: ~うえで
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning After doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
よく考えたうえで、本当に留学するかどうか決めなさい

Think carefully before deciding if you really want to study abroad.

docs.title: ~にかけては
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning When it comes to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
渋谷駅は利用する人の多さにかけては日本一です。

Shibuya Station has the largest number of people using it in Japan.

docs.title: ~とは
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning The definition of X is...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
土足厳禁とは、靴をはいたまま中に入ってはいけないという

“土足厳禁” means that you should not go inside with your shoes on.

docs.title: ということは
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning That means...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
田中さん、まだなの? ということは、遅刻だね

Isn't Tanaka-san coming yet? That means he/she is late.

docs.title: ~まい
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Must not / won't...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼は口が軽い。絶対に大切なことは話すまい。

He's very talkative. I will never tell him anything important.

docs.title: ~ようか〜まいか
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Whether or not...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
仕事がきついので、辞めようか辞めるまいか迷っている

My job is too hard and I don't know if I should quit or not.

docs.title: ~ものだから
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Because... (excuse/reason)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
昨日は忙しかったものだから、この仕事はまだ終わっていないんです。

I was busy yesterday, so I haven't finished this job yet.

docs.title: ~つもり
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Conviction / intention...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
父はまだ元気なつもりだけど、もう90歳だからねえ。

My father thinks he is still healthy, but he is actually 90 years old.

docs.title: ~ものがある
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning There is a feeling of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
いくらかわいくても、毎日孫のめんどうを見るのは、正直つらいものがある

To be honest, it's hard to take care of my grandchildren every day, no matter how cute they are.

docs.title: ~ことに
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning To my (surprise, disappointment, etc.)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
残念なことに、いちばん会いたかった佐藤さんが来られなくなった。

Unfortunately, the person I wanted to see the most, Sato-san, could not come.

docs.title: ~ことか
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning How much...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
母は一人で四人の子どもを育てた。どれほど大変だったことか。

My mother raised four children on her own. I can't imagine how hard it must have been.

docs.title: ~ないものか
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning I wonder if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もう少し野菜の値段が下がらないものか。

I wish the price of vegetables would drop a little more.

docs.title: ~たいものだ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning I really want to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
いつかは広い家に住んで、犬を飼いたいものだ。

Someday I want to live in a big house and have a dog.

docs.title: ~のことだから
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Since it is... (expectations based on a person's nature)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
(いつも遅刻する)スミスさんのことだから、今日も遅れてくるんじゃない?

Since Smith-san is always late, he would probably be late again today.

docs.title: ~ことから
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning From the fact that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この辺は坂が多いことから、坂上町という名前がつけられました

The name "Sakagami-machi" came from the many hills in the area.

docs.title: ~からには、からは、以上は、上は
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Now that / since...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
オリンピックに出るからには、金メダルを取らなければならない。

Since I'm going to compete in the Olympics, of course I have to win a gold medal.

docs.title: ~ところをみると
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Judging from...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
お互いに何も話さないところをみると、けんかでもしたのかもしれないね。

Seeing that they didn't say anything to each other, they might have had a fight.

docs.title: ~だけに/~だけあって
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As expected / precisely because...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
夏休みに入っただけに、どこもこんでいる

As the summer vacation season has just started, everywhere is crowded.

docs.title: ~ことだし
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Since... / seeing as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
雨も降ってることだし、今日はもう帰ろうか。

It's raining, so let's go home for the day.

docs.title: ~てこそ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Only by doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
新鮮な魚で作ってこそ、おいしいすしになる。

Only by using fresh fish can you make delicious sushi.

docs.title: あまりの〜に
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Because it was too...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今日はあまりの暑さに、食事をする気にもなれない。

It's too hot today, and I don't even want to eat.

docs.title: ~ものなら/~もんなら
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning If it were possible...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
娘が病気でつらそうだ。代われるものなら、代わってあげたい。

My daughter is sick and in pain. If it were possible, I would like to switch her body and mine.

docs.title: ~ないことには〜ない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Unless...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
くつは、はいてみないことには歩きやすいかどうかはわからない

You can't tell if the shoes are comfortable to walk in unless you try them on.

docs.title: ~さえ〜ば
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As long as / if only...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
スマホさえあれば、現金やカードがなくても買い物ができる。

With just a smartphone, you can make purchases without cash or credit cards.

docs.title: ~ようものなら
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning If one were to do... (leads to bad result)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
妻の誕生日を忘れようものなら、家に入れてもらえないかもしれない。

If I were to forget my wife's birthday, she might not let me in the house.

docs.title: ~となると
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning When it comes to... / If it comes to that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
海外に住むとなると、友だちにも簡単に会えなくなるなあ。

If I were to live abroad, I would not be able to see my friends as often.

docs.title: ~にしても〜にしても/~にしろ〜にしろ/~にせよ〜にせよ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Whether... or...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
スミスさんにしても、チンさんにしても、ここの留学生はみんな日本語がペラペラだ。

Like Smith-san and Chin-san, all the foreign students here speak good Japanese.

docs.title: ~に基づいて、をもとに(して)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Based on...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このドラマは、実際にあった事件に基づいて制作された

This drama was produced based on a real incident.

docs.title: ~のもと(で)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Under (supervision/influence)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
最新のロボットを作りたいなら、この大学の田中先生のもとで学ぶべきだよ。

If you want to build the latest robot, you should study under Professor Tanaka of this university.

docs.title: ~に沿って
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Along with / in accordance with...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
お配りした資料に沿って、ご説明いたします。

I will explain according to the handout I gave you.

docs.title: ~どころか
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Far from...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
先日の旅行は、楽しいどころかハプニングばかりで本当に疲れた。

The day's trip was not fun at all, despite my expectations, and I was really tired from all the unexpected events.

docs.title: 一方で
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning On the other hand...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
日本での生活は、大変なことが多い一方、新しい経験ができて楽しい。

My life in Japan has been a lot of hard work, but it has been fun to have new experiences.

docs.title: ~に反して
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Contrary to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
親の期待に反して、息子は医者にはならず、小さな店をしている。

Contrary to our expectations, my son did not become a doctor and runs a small store.

docs.title: ~というより
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Rather than...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あまりにも人が多くて、にぎやかというよりうるさいですよ。

There are too many people, and it's noisy rather than lively.

docs.title: ~だけまし
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning At least / it's better than...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ハイキングには寒いけど、雪が降らないだけましですね。

The weather is cold for hiking, but it's still good because it's not snowing.

docs.title: 〜くらいなら
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Rather than (do X, I would do Y)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あの人に謝るくらいなら、殴られたほうがいい。

I'd rather he/she punch me than I apologize to him/her.

docs.title: ~ざるをえない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Have no choice but to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
父に言われたなら、嫌でも弟の面倒を見ざるをえない。

My father told me to do it, so even if I didn't want to, I'd have to take care of my younger brother.

docs.title: ~て(は)いられない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Cannot afford to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もうすぐ試験だから、遊んではいられない。

I have exams coming up soon, so I have no time to hung out.

docs.title: ~ないではいられない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Can't help but...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この曲を聴くと、踊らないではいられない。

When I listen to this song, I can't help but dance.

docs.title: ~てならない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Cannot help feeling / unbelievably...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
スミスさんがアメリカに帰ってしまうのが、残念でなりません

I am so disappointed that Smith-san is going back to the United States.

docs.title: ~にほかならない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Nothing but...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今回優勝できたのは、チームワークのよさにほかならない

The reason why the team was able to win this time was nothing but the teamwork.

docs.title: ~というものだ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Is exactly what is meant by...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
困った時には助け合うのが本当の友達というものだ

True friends help each other in times of trouble.

docs.title: ~にすぎない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Nothing more than...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
中国語を勉強しているといっても、まだ、簡単な文字が読めるにすぎません。

Even though I am learning Chinese, I can still only read simple characters.

docs.title: ~(より)ほかない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Have no choice but to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
こんな田舎にタクシーなんて来ないし、歩いて帰るほかないですね。

It's a very rural area, so cabs won't come, and we have to walk home.

docs.title: ~おそれがある
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning There is a risk that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このワクチンを打つと、副作用が出るおそれがあります。

There is a risk that this vaccination may cause side effects.

docs.title: ~かねない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Might (bad consequence)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ちゃんと病院に行かないと、病気が悪化しかねないよ

If you don't go to the hospital properly, your illness could get worse.

docs.title: ~に相違ない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Without a doubt...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この学校で成績トップの彼女なら、東大に合格するに相違ない

She is the student with the highest grades at this school, so she will definitely get into Tokyo University.

docs.title: ~とか
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning I heard that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
娘さんがご結婚されるとか。おめでとうございます。

I heard that your daughter is getting married. Congratulations.

docs.title: ~やら〜やら
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Things like... and...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
テーブルの上には、すしやらとんかつやら料理でいっぱい

There are sushi, tonkatsu, and many other dishes on the table.

docs.title: ~といった
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Such as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
納豆やとうふといった、カロリーの低いものを食べましょう

Eat low-calories foods like natto and tofu.

docs.title: ~というか〜というか
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Or rather... / I'm not sure if it's A or B...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼女のドレスは、派手というか奇抜というか、とても目立っていた

Her dress was standing out, not to say flashy or outlandish.

docs.title: ~抜きで/~抜きにして
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Without...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
昼ごはん抜きで会議をしていたので、お腹が空いてしょうがない

We had a meeting without lunch, so I am very hungry.

docs.title: ~ことなく
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Without (doing)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
両親に相談することなく、留学を決めた。

I decided to study abroad without discussing it with my parents.

docs.title: ~をこめて
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Filled with (emotion)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
先生に感謝をこめて花束をあげました

I gave the teacher a bouquet of flowers to express my gratitude.

docs.title: ~に限り
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Only for...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この商品は、小学生以下に限り、半額です。

This product is half-price only for elementary school students and younger.

docs.title: ~に限って
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Particularly... / Of all things...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
うちの子に限って、いじめなんてするはずがない

My child, of all people, would never bully others.

docs.title: ~限り(は)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As long as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
タバコをやめない限り、健康にはなりませんよ

As long as you don't quit smoking, you will never be healthy.

docs.title: ~限りでは
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As far as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私が知っている限りでは、彼はいい人ですよ

As far as I know, he's a good man.

docs.title: ~どころではない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Not the time/place for...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
子どもが大けがをして、誕生日パーティーどころじゃなかった。

My child was seriously injured and we couldn't have his birthday party.

docs.title: ~ものか
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning I'll never...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あの店の料理は本当にまずかった。二度と行くものか

The food in that restaurant was really bad. I will never go back there again.

docs.title: 〜っこない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning There's no way that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
他人の気持ちなんて、わかりっこない

There's no way to know what other people are feeling.

docs.title: ~わけがない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning It is impossible that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
勉強しない私が、いい大学に入れるわけがない

I didn't study hard enough, so there was no way I could get into a good university.

docs.title: ~というものではない/~というものでもない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning It doesn't necessarily mean...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ダイエットするからって、食べなければいいというものではない

It does not mean that if you do not eat, your diet will be successful.

docs.title: ~のみならず(~も)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Not only...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
田中さんは、英語のみならず中国語も話せる

Tanaka-san speaks not only English but also Chinese.

docs.title: ~に限らず
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Not limited to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このゲームは、子どもに限らず大人にも人気がある。

This game is popular not only among children but also among adults.

docs.title: ~はもとより(~も)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Not only... but of course...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あの歌手は、歌はもとより、表現力もすばらしい

That singer is not only a great singer, but also a great expressive artist.

docs.title: ~うえに
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning In addition to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
寝坊したうえに、道路も混んでいたので遅刻しました

I overslept and the roads were crowded, so I was late.

docs.title: ~も~ば、〜も
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Both... and...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
旅行には行きたいが、時間もなければ、お金もない。

I want to travel, but I don't have the time or the money.

docs.title: ~を問わず
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Regardless of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
楽なので、場所を問わずスニーカーばかりはいています。

I wear sneakers everywhere because they are easy to walk in.

docs.title: ~もかまわず
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Without caring about...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼に会えたのがうれしくて、人目もかまわず抱きついた。

I was so happy to see him that I hugged him without worrying about being looked at.

docs.title: ~はともかく(として)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Putting aside...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あのレストランは、味はともかく値段が安い

That restaurant, aside from the taste, is cheap.

docs.title: ~はさておき
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Aside from...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
スミスさんは、性格はさておき、仕事はよくできる。

Aside from his personality, Smith-san does his job well.

docs.title: ~をめぐって
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Over / concerning...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
親の遺産をめぐって、兄弟が争うドラマである。

It's a drama about siblings fighting over their parents' inheritance.

docs.title: ~に応えて/~に応える
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning In response to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
妻の希望に応えて、今年の旅行はハワイに行くことにした。

In response to my wife's wishes, we decided to go on a trip to Hawaii this year.

docs.title: ~をはじめ/~をはじめとして
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Starting with... / including...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今日の会議には、会長をはじめ、役員の方も出席されます。

The chairman and other officers will also attend today's meeting.

docs.title: ~限り
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As far as / until the end...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
見渡す限り、田んぼが広がっている

The rice fields spread out as far as the eye could see.

docs.title: ~からして
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Judging from...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あの店は、店員の言葉づかいからしてダメだ。

The clerks at that store are bad even in their manner of speaking.

docs.title: ~にわたって
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Throughout / over a period of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
3日間にわたって、この会場でバレエコンクールが行われます。

The ballet competition will be held at this venue for three days.

docs.title: ~だけ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As much as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
暑い日は、できるだけ水を飲むようにしてください。

Try to drink as much water as possible on hot days.

docs.title: ~ものだ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning It's natural that / one should...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
話をするときは、相手の目を見るものだ

Look people in the eye when you speak.

docs.title: ~ものではない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning One should not...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
親に向かって、そんなことを言うものではない

You can't say things like that to your parents.

docs.title: ~ことだ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Should / ought to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
負けたくなかったら、もっと練習することだね

If you don't want to lose, you have to practice more.

docs.title: ~反面
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning On the other hand...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
一人暮らしは寂しい反面自由で気楽だ

Living alone is lonely, but it is also free and easy.

docs.title: ~だけのことはある
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning No wonder / it shows...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼だけは全然疲れていない。やっぱり若いだけのことはある

Only he is not tired at all. It truly shows the advantage of being young.

docs.title: ~うる/~える/~えない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Can / cannot possibly...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
これだけ毎日勉強していれば、今年こそ合格しうる。

Since I've been studying so hard every day. I'm sure I'll pass this year.

docs.title: ~がたい
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Hard to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
10年後には宇宙で生活できるなんて、信じがたい

It is very hard to believe that we can live in space in 10 years.

docs.title: ~ようがない
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning There is no way to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
病気の進行が早く、もう治しようがないんです。

The disease is progressing so fast that there is no way to treat it anymore.

docs.title: ~かねる
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Cannot (do something politely)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
お客様のためにならないような意見には、賛成しかねる。

I don't agree with opinions that are not in the best interest of customers.

docs.title: ~たきり
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Since (doing) / nothing but...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼とは10年前に会ったきり、一度も会っていない。

I haven't seen him since ten years ago.

docs.title: ~あげく
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning In the end / finally (after a long process)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
3時間も待ったあげく、売り切れで買えなかった。

After waiting for three hours, I couldn't buy it because it was sold out.

docs.title: ~末(に)
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning At the end of / finally...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
長い話し合いの末、やっと納得してもらった。

After much discussion, they finally agreed.

docs.title: ~ずじまい
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Ended up not doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
旅行に数冊本を持っていったが、結局読まずじまいだった

I brought a few books with me on my trip, but never ended up reading them.

docs.title: ~次第だ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Depending on / the reason is...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
社長からの連絡で、急いで出社した次第です。

I rushed to the office when I heard from the president.

docs.title: ~抜く
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning To do to the end...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
戦争を生き抜いた祖父の言葉は重い。

The words of my grandfather, who survived the war, carry great weight.

docs.title: ~にともなって/~にともない/~にともなう
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Along with...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
スマホの普及にともなって、紙の新聞を読む人が少なくなってきた。

As smartphones become more and more popular, fewer and fewer people read paper newspapers.

docs.title: ~につれて
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning As... then...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
台風が近づくにつれて、雨が強くなってきた
