As the typhoon approached, the rain became heavier.

docs.title: ~かいあって/~かいもなく
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Thanks to the effort of... / despite the effort of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
毎日のトレーニングのかいあって、優勝することができた

The daily training was worth it, and I was able to win.

docs.title: ~つつある
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Is currently (doing)...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
日本では子どもの数が減りつつあり、50年後には今の半分になる

The number of children in Japan is decreasing, and in 50 years, the number of children will be half of what it is now.

docs.title: ~一方だ
docs.text: Level N2 Meaning Tends to / just keeps...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
雨が続いて、洗濯物がたまる一方だ。

It's been raining every day and the laundry is piling up.

docs.title: N3 — Intermediate Grammar Patterns
docs.text: Pattern Meaning ~おかげで Thanks to... ~せいで Because of... / Due to... ~からこそ Because... ~によって① Due to... ~(んだ)もの/もん Explanation, reason ~ことはない There is no need to... ~べきだ Should... ~ように So that / in order to (or as a soft command) ~こと Rule or command ~によって② By means of... ~によれば/~によると According to... ~を通して/通じて① Through / via ~から〜にかけて From... through... ~を中心に Focused on / centered on ~を通して/通じて② Throughout (a period) ~出す Suddenly begin to... 縮約形(Contraction) Colloquial contractions (e.g. ~ておく -> ~とく) ~ないと/なきゃ/なくちゃ Must / have to ~たって Even if... (colloquial) 〜っけ Trying to recall something ~と、〜た/~たら、〜た When... (discovery/surprise) ~としたら/~とすれば If (hypothetical) ~ば~のに If only... (regret) もし〜たなら If (hypothetical past) ~がち Tend to... ~だらけ Covered with / full of (usually negative) 〜っぱなし Leaving something in an improper state 〜っぽい -ish / looking like... ~気味 Slight tendency / feeling a bit... ~ふりをする Pretend to... ~まま As it is / keeping the same state ~みたい Looks like / seems like (まるで)~ようだ Just like... ~がる Shows signs of (third person's feelings) ~( )きり Only / just (indicates a limit) ~ばかり Nothing but / always ~てほしい/~てもらいたい I want someone to do... ~と/たら/ば、いい(なあ) I wish / I hope... ~ますように/~ませんように I pray/hope that... ~として As... (role/capacity) ~にとって For / to (someone's perspective) ~ばかりか/~ばかりでなく Not only... but also... ~はもちろん〜も Not to mention... / let alone... たとえ〜ても Even if... どんなに〜ても/いくら〜ても No matter how much... ~つもりだった I had planned to... (but didn't) ~わけだ No wonder... / That explains why... つまり In other words ~ということだ① It means that... ~ことがある/~こともある There are times when... に対して① Towards / against... 向け Targeted for / aimed at... ~というと/~といえば/~といったら Speaking of... ~について About / regarding... ~ことだ Should / must (giving advice) ~上げる/~上がる To finish doing... ~切る/~切れる To do completely / entirely ~たところ When I did... (result) ~うちに① While (doing something, another thing happens) ~かけ Half-done / in the middle of... ~てからでないと/~てからでなければ Unless... / Not until... ~てはじめて Not until... (did I realize) ~ところだった Almost did / was just about to... ~たとたん As soon as... ~とともに Together with / As... then... ~たて Just done / freshly done ~ついでに While doing..., might as well... ~始める Start to... ~終わる Finish doing... ~ようとする Be about to / try to... ~ようとしない Doesn't try to / shows no sign of... ~うちに② While (a condition holds true) ~において In / at (place, time, context) ~最中に Right in the middle of... ~たものだ Used to (do something in the past) ~ないことはない It's not that I don't... ~ばよかった Should have... ~ずにはいられない Can't help but... ~てしょうがない/~てしかたがない Can't help / unbearably... ~わけにはいかない Cannot afford to / must not... ~たびに Every time... ~とおり(に) Just as / according to... ~にしたがって As (one thing happens, another happens) ~ていく/~てくる Will become / continue to... ~続ける Continue doing... ば~ほど The more... the more... ~くせに Even though / despite (blaming/criticizing) ~くらい、ぐらい/~ほど To the extent that... ~こそ For sure / definitely (emphasis) ~(で)さえ Even... ~なんか/~なんて Things like... (belittling/modesty) ~まで Even / as far as... ~という Called / named... ~ということだ② It is said that / I heard... [命令形/禁止形]と言われる To be told to / not to... らしい Seems like / typical of... ~んだって I hear that... (colloquial) ~かなあ I wonder... もしかすると/もしかしたら〜かもしれない Perhaps / maybe... ~に違いない Must be / without a doubt... ~しかない Have no choice but to... じゃない Isn't it? (seeking agreement) ~ずに Without doing... ~わけではない It doesn't mean that... ~ことは〜が It is true that... but... まったく/めったに/決して/少しも〜ない Not at all / rarely / never ~とは限らない Not necessarily so... ~かわりに Instead of... ~というより Rather than... ~にかわって/~にかわり In place of / on behalf of... ~にしては Considering it's / for... ~に対して② In contrast to... ~に比べて Compared to... ~ほど･･･は･･･ない/~くらい･･･は･･･ない There is nothing as... as... ~によって③ Depending on... ~わりに(は) Although / despite / relatively... ~というのは The meaning of X is... ~といっても Even if I say that... ~に関して/関する Regarding / related to...

docs.title: ~おかげで
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Thanks to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この本のおかげで合格できました

Thanks to this book, I passed the exam.

docs.title: ~せいで
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Because of... / Due to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
電車が遅れたせいで、遅刻した

I was late because the train was late.

docs.title: ~からこそ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Because...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
毎日勉強したからこそ、試験に合格できたんです。

I was able to pass the exam, because I studied everyday.

docs.title: ~によって①
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Due to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
台風によって、電車が2時間以上遅れました

Due to the typhoon, the train was more than 2 hours late.

docs.title: ~(んだ)もの/もん
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Explanation, reason

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
「どうして宿題しなかったの?」 「だって、時間なかったんだもん」

"Why didn't you do your homework?" "Because I didn't have time."

docs.title: ~ことはない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning There is no need to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
まだ時間があるから、そんなに急ぐことはないよ

There is plenty of time so there is no need to rush.

docs.title: ~べきだ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Should...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
借りたお金は必ず返すべきです。

You should definitely return money you borrowed.

docs.title: ~ように
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning So that / in order to (or as a soft command)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
肉だけじゃなく、野菜も食べるように

Eat not only meat but also vegetables.

docs.title: ~こと
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Rule or command

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
部屋に入る前は、必ずノックすること

Be sure to knock before entering the room.

docs.title: ~によって②
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning By means of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この問題は話し合いによって解決できます。

We can solve this problem by talking together.

docs.title: ~に違いない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Must be / without a doubt...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼女は日本人に違いない

She must be Japanese.

docs.title: ~しかない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Have no choice but to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
両親がいないから、自分で料理を作るしかない

My parents are not home so I have no choice but to cook for myself.

docs.title: じゃない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Isn't it? (seeking agreement)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
その服、いいじゃない。

I like your clothes./ That's a nice outfit.

docs.title: ~ずに
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Without doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
夫はかさを持たずに、出かけました

My husband went out without taking his umbrella.

docs.title: ~わけではない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning It doesn't mean that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
料理は、高ければ何でもおいしいわけではない

All expensive dishes are not altogether delicious.

docs.title: ~ことは〜が
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning It is true that... but...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
中国語は話せることは話せるが、あまりうまくない。

I can speak Chinese but not that well.

docs.title: まったく/めったに/決して/少しも〜ない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Not at all / rarely / never

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私は、まったくサッカーに興味がありません。

I am not interested in soccer at all.

docs.title: ~とは限らない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Not necessarily so...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
高いものが安いものよりいいとは限らない。

Expensive things are not always better than cheap things.

docs.title: ~かわりに
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Instead of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今朝はコーヒーのかわりにお茶を飲んだ

This morning, I drank green tea instead of coffee.

docs.title: ~というより
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Rather than...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今年の夏はすずしいというより寒いくらいです。

This year's summer has been cold rather than just cool.

docs.title: ~によれば/~によると
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning According to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
妹によれば、妹の彼氏は歌がうまいらしい。

According to my younger sister, her boyfriend is a very good singer.

docs.title: ~にかわって/~にかわり
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning In place of / on behalf of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
人間にかわってロボットが作業をしている

Robots are doing the work instead of humans.

docs.title: ~にしては
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Considering it's / for...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
8月にしてはすずしいですね

It is cool for August.

docs.title: ~に対して②
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning In contrast to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
静かな父に対して、母はよく話す。

While my father is quiet, my mother talks a lot.

docs.title: ~に比べて
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Compared to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今年は去年に比べて、雨の量が多い。

This year, compared to last year, the quantity of rain is much more.

docs.title: ~ほど･･･は･･･ない/~くらい･･･は･･･ない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning There is nothing as... as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼女ほど歌が上手な人はいません

There is nobody who can sing as good as she can.

docs.title: ~によって③
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Depending on...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
人によって、好きな食べ物は違います。

Favorite foods differ depending on the person.

docs.title: ~わりに(は)
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Although / despite / relatively...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このステーキは、高いわりにまずい。

This steak tastes bad for the price.

docs.title: ~というのは
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning The meaning of X is...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
「スマホ」というのはスマートフォンの略だ

"Sumaho" is an abbreviation for "Smartphone".

docs.title: ~といっても
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Even if I say that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
料理をするといっても、ラーメンぐらいですよ

When I say I cook, it's just about making ramen.

docs.title: ~に関して/関する
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Regarding / related to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ゴルフに関して、熱心な議論をした。

We had a passionate discussion about golf!

docs.title: ~を通して/通じて①
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Through / via

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼とは、インターネットを通じて知り合った

I met him through the internet.

docs.title: ~から〜にかけて
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning From... through...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今夜から明日の朝にかけて、雪でしょう

It will snow from tonight through tomorrow morning.

docs.title: ~を中心に
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Focused on / centered on

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
スミスさんを中心に、プロジェクトの準備を始める。

We will start preparing for the project with Mr. Smith as the central figure.

docs.title: ~を通して/通じて②
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Throughout (a period)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
最近は、一年を通しておいしいフルーツが食べられる

These days, we can eat delicious fruits all year round.

docs.title: ~出す
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Suddenly begin to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
急に雨が降り出した。

It suddenly started raining.

docs.title: 縮約形(Contraction)
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Colloquial contractions (e.g. ~ておく -> ~とく)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
コーヒー、買っといたよ

I bought coffee for you, you know.

docs.title: ~ないと/なきゃ/なくちゃ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Must / have to

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
レポートは明日までだから、早く書かないと

My report is due tomorrow, so I must do it now.

docs.title: ~たって
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Even if... (colloquial)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今から走ったって、間に合わないよ

Even if you run now, you won't make it in time.

docs.title: 〜っけ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Trying to recall something

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
これ、いくらだったっけ?

How much was this, again?

docs.title: ~と、〜た/~たら、〜た
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning When... (discovery/surprise)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
家に帰ると、電気が消えていた

When I got home, the lights were off.

docs.title: ~としたら/~とすれば
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning If (hypothetical)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もし100万円あったとしたら、この仕事をやめる

If I had a million yen, I would quit this job.

docs.title: ~ば~のに
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning If only... (regret)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ひらがなで書いてあれば、読めるのに

I could read it If it were written in hiragana.

docs.title: もし〜たなら
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning If (hypothetical past)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もし日本に来なかったなら、日本語を勉強していなかったと思う。

If I hadn't come to Japan, I would not have studied Japanese.

docs.title: ~がち
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Tend to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
娘は体がよわくて、学校を休みがちだ。

My daughter has a weak constitution, so tends absent from school.

docs.title: ~だらけ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Covered with / full of (usually negative)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
子どもたちは、どろだらけで遊んでいる

The children are playing in the mud.

docs.title: 〜っぱなし
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Leaving something in an improper state

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
かぎを開けっぱなしで、出てしまいました。

I left home with the door unlocked.

docs.title: 〜っぽい
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning -ish / looking like...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今日は、熱っぽいです。

I have a slight fever today.

docs.title: ~気味
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Slight tendency / feeling a bit...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今日は、ちょっとかぜ気味です。

I have a light cold today.

docs.title: ~ふりをする
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Pretend to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
聞こえているのに、聞こえないふりをしている

He can hear, but he pretends not to hear.

docs.title: ~まま
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning As it is / keeping the same state

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
くつをはいたまま、部屋に入らないでください。

Don't enter the room with your shoes on.

docs.title: ~みたい
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Looks like / seems like

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この部屋には、だれもいないみたいだ。

This room looks deserted.

docs.title: (まるで)~ようだ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Just like...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
合格したなんて、まるで夢のようです。

I passed, it's just like a dream.

docs.title: ~がる
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Shows signs of (third person's feelings)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
むすめは犬をこわがっています

My daughter is afraid of dogs.

docs.title: ~( )きり
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Only / just (indicates a limit)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
二人っきりで会いたいです。

I'd like to meet with you alone.

docs.title: ~ばかり
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Nothing but / always

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あまいものばかり食べていると、太りますよ

If you only eat sweets, you will gain weight.

docs.title: ~てほしい/~てもらいたい
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning I want someone to do...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ペンを貸してほしいんですけど･･･

Could I borrow your pen?

docs.title: ~と/たら/ば、いい(なあ)
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning I wish / I hope...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もっと歌が上手だといいなあ

I wish I could sing better.

docs.title: ~ますように/~ませんように
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning I pray/hope that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
JLPT N3に合格しますように

I pray that I will pass JLPT N3.

docs.title: ~として
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning As... (role/capacity)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
母として、子どものしたことをあやまります。

As a mother, I apologize for what my children have done.

docs.title: ~にとって
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning For / to (someone's perspective)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あなたは私にとって大切な友だちです

You are a precious friend for me.

docs.title: ~ばかりか/~ばかりでなく
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Not only... but also...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
田中さんは英語ばかりか中国語も話せる。

Mr.Tanaka not only speaks English but he also speaks Chinese.

docs.title: ~はもちろん〜も
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Not to mention... / let alone...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
私は自転車はもちろん、バイクにも乗れる。

I can ride a motorbike, to say nothing of a bicycle.

docs.title: たとえ〜ても
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Even if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
たとえ両親に反対されても、行きます。

Even if my parents oppose me, I will go.

docs.title: どんなに〜ても/いくら〜ても
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning No matter how much...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
どんなに勉強しても、テストで100点を取れない

I'm not getting a perfect score in my test no matter how much I study.

docs.title: ~つもりだった
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning I had planned to... (but didn't)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
アイスは食べないつもりだったけど、食べちゃった

I was not going to eat ice cream but I ended up eating it.

docs.title: ~わけだ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning No wonder... / That explains why...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あついわけだ。エアコンがついていない

No wonder it feel hot. The air conditioner is off.

docs.title: つまり
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning In other words

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
彼は兄の息子。つまり、私のおいです。

He's my older brother's son. In other words, he's my nephew.

docs.title: ~ということだ①
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning It means that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
試験の結果は90%、つまり合格ということだ。

The result of the test is 90%, in order words, you passed.

docs.title: ~ことがある/~こともある
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning There are times when...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
北海道は4月でも雪が降ることがある。

It can snow in Hokkaido even in April.

docs.title: に対して①
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Towards / against...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あの先生は、子どもに対してきびしい。

The teacher is strict to children.

docs.title: 向け
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Targeted for / aimed at...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この本は、子ども向けですね。

This book is targeted for children.

docs.title: ~というと/~といえば/~といったら
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Speaking of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
日本の食べ物というと、すしが有名です。

Speaking of Japanese food, sushi is famous.

docs.title: ~について
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning About / regarding...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
日本の歴史について、勉強する

I study Japanese history.

docs.title: ~ことだ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Should / must (giving advice)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
かぜをひいたなら、ゆっくり休むことだ

If you have a cold, relax and rest.

docs.title: ~上げる/~上がる
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning To finish doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この小説を、一か月で書き上げた

I wrote this novel in one month.

docs.title: ~切る/~切れる
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning To do completely / entirely

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
フルマラソンを走り切った

I managed to run the full marathon.

docs.title: ~たところ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning When I did... (result)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
レシピの通りに作ったところ、うまくいった

When I made it according to the recipe, it went well.

docs.title: ~うちに①
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning While (doing something, another thing happens)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
電話で話しているうちに、朝になった

The day broke while I was talking on the phone.

docs.title: ~かけ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Half-done / in the middle of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この本は、まだ読みかけです

I haven't finished this book yet.

docs.title: ~てからでないと/~てからでなければ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Unless... / Not until...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
母に聞いてからでないと、行けません

I can't go until I ask my mother.

docs.title: ~てはじめて
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Not until... (did I realize)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この映画を見てはじめて、日本に興味を持った。

I didn't have any interest in Japan until I saw this movie.

docs.title: ~ところだった
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Almost did / was just about to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
タクシーにスマホを忘れるところだった

I almost left my smartphone in the taxi.

docs.title: ~たとたん
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning As soon as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ベッドに入ったとたん、寝てしまった

I fell asleep right after getting in bed.

docs.title: ~とともに
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Together with / As... then...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
年を取るとともに、目が悪くなってきた

As I get older, my eyes are getting worse.

docs.title: ~たて
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Just done / freshly done

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このパンは焼きたてです。

This bread is just baked.

docs.title: ~ついでに
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning While doing..., might as well...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
出かけるついでに、コーヒーを買ってきて

Get some coffee while you are going out.

docs.title: ~始める
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Start to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
母はもう朝ごはんを作り始めましたよ。

My mother already started cooking breakfast.

docs.title: ~終わる
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Finish doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
食べ終わったら、おさらを洗ってください。

Once you've finished eating, please wash the dishes.

docs.title: ~ようとする
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Be about to / try to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
出かけようとしたとき、電話がかかってきた。

When I was just about to go out, the telephone rang.

docs.title: ~ようとしない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Doesn't try to / shows no sign of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
理由を聞いても、息子は何も話そうとしない

Even when I ask why, my son won't say anything.

docs.title: ~うちに②
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning While (a condition holds true)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
日本にいるうちに、日本語が上手になりたい

I would like to improve my Japanese while I am in Japan.

docs.title: ~において
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning In / at (place, time, context)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
結果は掲示板において、発表されます

The result will be announced on the notice board.

docs.title: ~最中に
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Right in the middle of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
食事の最中に、スマホを見ないでください。

Please don't look at your smartphone while you are eating.

docs.title: ~たものだ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Used to (do something in the past)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
子どものころは、よく山で遊んだものだ

When I was a child, I used to play in the mountains.

docs.title: ~ないことはない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning It's not that I don't...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
魚を食べないことはないですが、あまり好きではありません。

It's not that I don't eat fish, I just don't like it that much.

docs.title: ~ばよかった
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Should have...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
雨だ。かさを持ってくればよかった

It's rain. I should have brought my umbrella.

docs.title: ~ずにはいられない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Can't help but...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
その本を読んだら、なかずにはいられない

Once you read this book, you can't help but cry.

docs.title: ~てしょうがない/~てしかたがない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Can't help / unbearably...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
母に会いたくてしょうがない

I want to see my mother so much.

docs.title: ~わけにはいかない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Cannot afford to / must not...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この宿題が終わるまで、寝るわけにはいきません

Until I finish this homework, I can't just go to bed.

docs.title: ~たびに
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Every time...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この歌を歌うたびに、母を思い出す。

Every time I sing this song, I'm reminded of my mother.

docs.title: ~とおり(に)
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Just as / according to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
地図のとおりに、行ってください。

Please follow the map.

docs.title: ~にしたがって
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning As (one thing happens, another happens)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
北に行くにしたがって、気温が低くなる

As you go further north, the temperature gets cooler.

docs.title: ~ていく/~てくる
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Will become / continue to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あの歌手の人気が上がっていく。

That singer will become popular. (from now on)

docs.title: ~続ける
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Continue doing...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
妹と電話で1時間も話し続けた。

I talked with my younger sister for one hour over the phone

docs.title: ば~ほど
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning The more... the more...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この本は、読めば読むほどおもしろい。

The more I read this book, the more interesting it gets.

docs.title: ~くせに
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Even though / despite (blaming/criticizing)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この部屋は、せまいくせに家賃がすごく高い

This room is small yet has really high rent.

docs.title: ~くらい、ぐらい/~ほど
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning To the extent that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もう少しも歩けないくらいつかれた

I'm so tired to the extent that I can't even take a step.

docs.title: ~こそ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning For sure / definitely (emphasis)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今年こそ、日本に行きたいです。

I want to finally go to Japan this year.

docs.title: ~(で)さえ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Even...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
先生は、私の名前さえ覚えていなかった

The teacher didn't even remember my name.

docs.title: ~なんか/~なんて
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Things like... (belittling/modesty)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
誕生日なのに、カップラーメンなんか食べたくない。

It's my birthday. I don't want to eat cup noodles.

docs.title: ~まで
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Even / as far as...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
子どもまで働かなければいけないんですか

Do even children have to work?

docs.title: ~という
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Called / named...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
部長、鈴木さんという人から電話です

Manager, you have a call from Mr. Suzuki.

docs.title: ~ということだ②
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning It is said that / I heard...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
鈴木さんからメールで、少し遅れるということです。

Mr. Suzuki messaged and he said he would be a little late.

docs.title: [命令形/禁止形]と言われる
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning To be told to / not to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
医者にタバコを吸うなと言われました

The doctor told me not to smoke.

docs.title: らしい
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Seems like / typical of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
夏らしい服ですね。

That's a very summery outfit.

docs.title: ~んだって
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning I hear that... (colloquial)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
スミスさん、卒業したら国に帰るんだって。

I heard that Mr. Smith is going to go back to his country after he graduates from school.

docs.title: ~かなあ
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning I wonder...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
明日のパーティーに、キムさんは来るかなあ

I wonder if Ms.Kim will come to tomorrow's party.

docs.title: もしかすると/もしかしたら〜かもしれない
docs.text: Level N3 Meaning Perhaps / maybe...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もしかすると、明日雨が降るかもしれない

It might rain tomorrow.

docs.title: N4 — Elementary Grammar Patterns
docs.text: Pattern Meaning ~し〜し (expressing multiple reasons or repeating similar things) ~て/で (a cause or reason) 〜んです (explanation, reason) それで therefore/ that's why ~ので because..., ....So ~てあげる (doing something for someone else) ~てくれる (something is done by someone for me or my family) ~てもらう (something is done by someone for me or my family) ~てくれませんか/~てくださいませんか/~ていただけませんか Could you...? 可能形 Verb Potential-form 命令形 Verb Imperative-form 禁止形 Verb Prohibitive-form 仮定形 Verb Conditional-form 意向形 Verb Volitional-form 受身形 Verb Passive-form 使役形 Verb Causative-form 使役受身形 Verb Causative passive-form 見える/聞こえる be audible/ be visible 自動詞/他動詞 Intransitive/Transitive Verb ~てある (the state after having done something with a particular purpose) ~てしまう (emphasis, regret) [Intransitive Verb] ている (the circumstance of remaining effects) ~と言う (someone) say... ~ところ just about/on the verge of doing something まだ〜ている still... ~ばかり just finished, something just occurred ほうがいい you should... ~なくてもいい need not do..., don't have to... こ/そ/あ② (to refer to things not visible to the speaker or the hearer) ~という意味 it means... ~ないで without V-ing ~やすい/~にくい easy to.../ hard to あとで after, later ~てから VS ~あとで Continuous action vs Completed action ~までに before..., by...(time limit) ~ながら while V-ing ~すぎる too much [Noun] しか〜ない only [Noun] and no other... [Quantifier]で (showing a limit) [Noun]で [Noun] express many different meaning ~とか ...or (colloquial) [Noun]でも ...or something [Particle]+は/も (emphasis or comparison) [Verb]+の+ [Particle] (の as a nominaliser) ~と if..., then ~ば if...(hypothetical condition) ~たら if, when, after, once ~なら if (giving information) ~のに even though... ~ても even if... ~場合は in the event of, in the case that... ~ようだ/みたいだ it seems that... ~そうだ(様態) looks like..., going to... (describing things) ~そうだ(伝聞) they say that...(hearsay) ~でしょう it will probably... ~と思う I think... ~かもしれない may... ~はず be supposed to be the case ~なさい do... (command) ~なければならない must, have to... Conversations in 命令形/禁止形 Conversations in Imperative/Prohibitive [V意向形]と思う I think I'll [Verb Volitional-form] 予定 schedule ~つもり intent/plan to... ~てみる try to do ~ておく (making preparations in advance) ~ように so that, in order to ~ために for..., in order to... ~(の)に for... ~ようになる to reach the point that/ to come to be that/ to turn into ~になる/ことになる has been decided ~がする can hear, see, smell ~ようにする (making a conscious effort to do something) ~(に)する/ことにする turn/make to do, decide to do ~から/でつくります made from/of ~てくる get..., come to... [Question word]~か ...what/when/where/who/how... ~かどうか whether it's ...or not [Adjective]+さ (an Adjective to turn it into a Noun) [Adjective]+[Verb] adjective modifying a verb 尊敬語(Respectful expressions) To show your respect to particular people's actions 尊敬語 Respectful expressions 謙譲語 Humble expressions ~てさしあげる/~てくださる/ ~ていただく Receiving, Giving honorific [使役形]ていただけませんか Would you please let me do...?

docs.title: ~し〜し
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (expressing multiple reasons or repeating similar things)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ラーメンはかんたんにできるし安いし、おいしい。

Ramen is easy to cook, cheap and delicious.

docs.title: ~て/で
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (a cause or reason)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
しゅくだいをわすれて、先生にしかられた

The teacher scolded me for forgetting to do my homework.

docs.title: 〜んです
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (explanation, reason)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
A: どうしたんですか。B: 頭がいたいんです。

A: What's the matter? B: My head hurts.

docs.title: それで
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning therefore/ that's why

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ここはコーヒーが100円です。それで、人気があるんです。

The coffee is 100 yen here. That's why it's popular.

docs.title: ~ので
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning because..., ....So

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
用事があるので、お先にしつれいします。

There's something I need to do, so excuse me for leaving before you.

docs.title: ~てあげる
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (doing something for someone else)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ルームメートに、料理を作ってあげました

I cooked a dish for my roommate.

docs.title: ~てくれる
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (something is done by someone for me or my family)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
わかい人が、にもつを持ってくれました

A young man carried my luggage for me.

docs.title: ~てもらう
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (something is done by someone for me or my family)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
田中さんに、ノートを貸してもらった

Mr. Tanaka lent me his notebook.

docs.title: ~てくれませんか/~てくださいませんか/~ていただけませんか
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Could you...?

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もっと勉強したいので、教えていただけませんか。

I would like to learn more, so could you please teach me?

docs.title: 可能形
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Verb Potential-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲める、食べられる、できる、来られる

[Potential-form] of "drink, eat, do, come"

docs.title: 命令形
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Verb Imperative-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲め、食べろ、しろ、来い

[Imperative-form] of "drink, eat, do, come"

docs.title: 禁止形
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Verb Prohibitive-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲むな、食べるな、するな、来るな

[Prohibitive-form] of "drink, eat, do, come"

docs.title: 仮定形
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Verb Conditional-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲めば、食べれば、すれば、来れば

[Conditional-form] of "drink, eat, do, come"

docs.title: 意向形
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Verb Volitional-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲もう、食べよう、しよう、来よう

[Volitional-form] of "drink, eat, do, come"

docs.title: 受身形
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Verb Passive-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲まれる、食べられる、される、来られる

[Passive-form] of "drink, eat, do, come"

docs.title: 使役形
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Verb Causative-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲ませる、食べさせる、させる、来させる

[Causative-form] of "drink, eat, do, come"

docs.title: 使役受身形
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Verb Causative passive-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲ませられる、食べさせられる、させられる、来させられる

[Causative passive-form] of "drink, eat, do, come"

docs.title: 見える/聞こえる
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning be audible/ be visible

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
部屋から、テレビの音が聞こえます。

The sound of a TV can be heard./ I can hear the TV from my room.

docs.title: 自動詞/他動詞
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Intransitive/Transitive Verb

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
パソコンがこわれました。/ パソコンをこわしました

The computer is broken. / I broke (destroyed) the computer.

docs.title: ~てある
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (the state after having done something with a particular purpose)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
予定はカレンダーに書いてあります

The schedule is written on the calendar.

docs.title: ~てしまう
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (emphasis, regret)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
昨日買ったジュースは飲んでしまいました

I drank all the juice that I bought yesterday.

docs.title: [Intransitive Verb] ている
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (the circumstance of remaining effects)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
かぎがかかっています

The door is locked.

docs.title: ~と言う
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (someone) say...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
鈴木さんは、明日休むと言っていました

Ms. Suzuki said she would take the day off tomorrow.

docs.title: ~ところ
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning just about/on the verge of doing something

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
たった今、食べたところです。

I have just eaten.

docs.title: まだ〜ている
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning still...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
まだ雨が降っています。

It's still raining.

docs.title: ~ばかり
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning just finished, something just occurred

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
先月、新しい会社に入ったばかりでしょう?

You only joined the new company last month, didn't you?

docs.title: ほうがいい
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning you should...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今日は、おふろに入らないほうがいいですよ

You shouldn't have a bath today.

docs.title: ~なくてもいい
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning need not do..., don't have to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今、しなくてもいいですよ。明日でもいいです。

You don't have to clean it now. You can do it tomorrow.

docs.title: こ/そ/あ②
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (to refer to things not visible to the speaker or the hearer)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ねえ、この話、知ってる? 山田さんがけっこん!

Do you know this story? Mr. Yamada is getting married.

docs.title: ~という意味
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning it means...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この漢字は、くつをぬげという意味です。

This kanji means to take off your shoes.

docs.title: ~ないで
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning without V-ing

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
昨日、寝ないで勉強したんです。

Last night, I studied without getting any sleep.

docs.title: ~やすい/~にくい
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning easy to.../ hard to

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
字が小さくて、読みにくいです。

The letters are small, so it's hard to read.

docs.title: あとで
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning after, later

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
仕事のあとで、ごはんを食べに行きます。

After work, I will go out to eat.

docs.title: ~てから VS ~あとで
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Continuous action vs Completed action

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ごはんを食べてから、薬を飲む。 VS ごはんを食べたあとで、薬を飲む。

(You don't know if you're done eating... The action continues.) VS (The "eating of meal" has to be completed.)

docs.title: ~までに
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning before..., by...(time limit)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あさってまでにレポートを出してください。

Please submit your paper by the day after tomorrow.

docs.title: ~ながら
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning while V-ing

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
テレビを見ながら、ごはんを食べます。

I eat dinner while watching TV.

docs.title: ~すぎる
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning too much

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このズボンは長すぎます。

These pants are too long for me.

docs.title: [Noun] しか〜ない
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning only [Noun] and no other...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ひとつしかありません。

I only have one.

docs.title: [Quantifier]で
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (showing a limit)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
10万円で買える車はありますか

Is there a car that I can buy for 100,000 yen?

docs.title: [Noun]で
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning [Noun] express many different meaning

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
エベレストは、世界でいちばん高い山です。

Everest is the highest mountain in the world.

docs.title: ~とか
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning ...or (colloquial)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このイベントでは、カラオケとかゲームとかをします。

At this event we will do things like karaoke and play games.

docs.title: [Noun]でも
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning ...or something

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
のどがかわきましたね。お茶でも飲みませんか

I'm thirsty. How about drinking tea or something?

docs.title: [Particle]+は/も
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (emphasis or comparison)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
母には話します。

I will talk to my mother. (I won't talk to other people)

docs.title: [Verb]+の+ [Particle]
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (の as a nominaliser)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ゲームをするのは、おもしろいです。

It's interesting to play the game.

docs.title: ~と
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning if..., then

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
おさけを飲むと、顔が赤くなるんです。

My face turns red when I drink.

docs.title: ~ば
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning if...(hypothetical condition)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この薬を飲めば、なおります。

If you take this medicine, you will get better.

docs.title: ~たら
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning if, when, after, once

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
テストが悪かったら、どうしよう

What if my test results are bad?

docs.title: ~なら
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning if (giving information)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
大阪に行くなら、たこやきを食べてください。

If you're going to Osaka, please try "takoyaki".

docs.title: ~のに
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning even though...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
勉強したのに、テスト0点でした

I studied, but I got 0 points on a test.

docs.title: ~ても
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning even if...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
雨が降っても、行きましょう

Let's go even if it rains.

docs.title: ~場合は
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning in the event of, in the case that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
間に合わない場合は、れんらくしてください。

Please contact us if you can't be there on time.

docs.title: ~ようだ/みたいだ
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning it seems that...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
せきも出るし、頭も痛いし、かぜをひいたようです

I've got a cough, and my head aches; it seems I might have caught a cold.

docs.title: ~そうだ(様態)
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning looks like..., going to... (describing things)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このスープ、からそうですね。

This soup looks spicy.

docs.title: ~そうだ(伝聞)
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning they say that...(hearsay)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
田中さんは、中国語が話せるそうです。

I hear that Mr.Tanaka can speak Chinese.

docs.title: ~でしょう
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning it will probably...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
明日は、午後から雨が降るでしょう

It will probably rain tomorrow afternoon.

docs.title: ~と思う
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning I think...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
それはかなりむずかしいと思います。

I think that is extremely difficult.

docs.title: ~かもしれない
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning may...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もしかして、時間に間に合わないかもしれません

We may not be able to make it in time.

docs.title: ~はず
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning be supposed to be the case

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
月よう日だから、開いているはずです

That shop must be open because today is Monday.

docs.title: ~なさい
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning do... (command)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もう一度、よく聞きなさい。

Listen carefully, again.

docs.title: ~なければならない
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning must, have to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
学校では制服を着なければなりません

You have to wear a uniform at school.

docs.title: Conversations in 命令形/禁止形
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Conversations in Imperative/Prohibitive

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
時間がない、早くしろ。

We don't have time, hurry up.

docs.title: [V意向形]と思う
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning I think I'll [Verb Volitional-form]

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
夏休みは、海に行こうと思っています。

I'm thinking I'll go to the sea for summer vacation.

docs.title: 予定
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning schedule

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
3時から、部長とかいぎの予定があります。

I have scheduled a meeting with the manager at 3:00.

docs.title: ~つもり
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning intent/plan to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
来年、日本に行くつもりです。

I'm going to go to Japan next year.

docs.title: ~てみる
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning try to do

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この服、着てみてもいいですか

May I try this piece of clothing on?

docs.title: ~ておく
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (making preparations in advance)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
出かける前に、子どもに夜ごはんを作っておいた

I had prepared dinner for my children before I going out.

docs.title: ~ように
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning so that, in order to

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
みんなに聞こえるように、話してください。

Please say it so everyone can hear.

docs.title: ~ために
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning for..., in order to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もっとはやく走るために、毎日練習しています。

I'm practicing every day in order to become able to run faster.

docs.title: ~(の)に
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning for...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
車をとめるのに、時間がかかりました

It took a long time to park the car.

docs.title: ~ようになる
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning to reach the point that/ to come to be that/ to turn into

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
英語が話せるようになりましたか

Are you able to speak English now?

docs.title: ~になる/ことになる
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning has been decided

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
父が入院することになりました

My father has been hospitalized.

docs.title: ~がする
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning can hear, see, smell

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
にぎやかな声がしますね

You can hear lively voices.

docs.title: ~ようにする
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (making a conscious effort to do something)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
毎日運動して、何でも食べるようにしています。

I try to exercise every day and eat a wide range of foods.

docs.title: ~(に)する/ことにする
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning turn/make to do, decide to do

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今年は国に帰らないことにしました

I've decided not to go back to my country this year.

docs.title: ~から/でつくります
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning made from/of

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このテーブルは木からつくられています。

This table is made of wood.

docs.title: ~てくる
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning get..., come to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ちょっと、コンビニに行ってきます

I'm going to the convenience store.

docs.title: [Question word]~か
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning ...what/when/where/who/how...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今、何時かわかりますか?

Do you know what time it is now?

docs.title: ~かどうか
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning whether it's ...or not

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
おいしいかどうか、食べないとわからない

We won't know if it's good or not until we eat it.

docs.title: [Adjective]+さ
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning (an Adjective to turn it into a Noun)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ふじ山の高さを知っていますか

Do you know how high Mt.Fuji is?

docs.title: [Adjective]+[Verb]
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning adjective modifying a verb

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もうすこし大きく書いてください。

Please write a little larger.

docs.title: 尊敬語(Respectful expressions)
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning To show your respect to particular people's actions

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
敬語

honorific expressions

docs.title: 尊敬語
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Respectful expressions

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
部長、ランチはめしあがりましたか

Manager, have you had lunch?

docs.title: 謙譲語
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Humble expressions

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
この本は社長にいただきました

I was given this book by the president.

docs.title: ~てさしあげる/~てくださる/ ~ていただく
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Receiving, Giving honorific

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
社長が時間をとってくださいました

The president made time for me.

docs.title: [使役形]ていただけませんか
docs.text: Level N4 Meaning Would you please let me do...?

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
明日、会社を休ませていただけませんか

Would you please let me take a day off tomorrow?

[Noun]で [Noun] = tool/range/place ~から〜まで from...to... が/けど but... [Verb]こと/の (nominalization) ~から because... ~ね isn't it/right? ~よ (informing the listener of something, or for emphasis) Verb Group [dictionary-form] Version G1 (-u, -aru/uru/oru), G2 (-iru/eru), G3 (suru/kuru) Verb Group [masu-form] Version G1 (-imasu), G2 (-emasu/imasu), G3 (shimasu/kimasu) Verb 辞書形 Verb dictionary-form Verb ます形 Verb masu-form Verb ない形 Verb nai-form Verb て形 Verb te-form Verb た形 Verb ta-form ~てください/〜ないでください please do.../don't do... ~ています (an action in progress) (a condition, habit, not a current action) ~てはいけません must not... ~てもいいですか may I [Verb] ~て (how to join two or more sentences together) ~てから after [Verb]/[Verb] and then... ~たことがあります have the experience of V-ing ~たり〜たり [Verb], [Verb] so on... ~ましょうか shall we/I [Verb] ~たいです I want to [Verb] ~に行きます I'm going (an event)/ to (do) ~まえに before... ~(こと)ができます can do... ~ことです (adding こと to a verb makes a noun) どんな [Noun] what kind of... どうですか how about, how... 何(なん/なに) what どうやって how... どれ/どの [Noun] which... もう/まだ already/not yet よく/だいたい/たくさん/少し/あまり/ぜんぜん Adverbs of degree/quantity Plain style [Verb] Dictionary, nai, ta, nakatta forms Plain style [i-Adjective] Present, negative, past, past negative Plain style [na-Adjective/Noun] da, ja nai, datta, ja nakatta forms Conversations in Plain style Casual conversation tone Polite style [Verb] masu, masen, mashita, masen deshita forms Polite style [i-Adjective] desu, kunai desu, katta desu, kunakatta desu Polite style [na-Adjective]/[Noun] desu, ja arimasen, deshita, ja arimasen deshita ~とき when... ~でしょう? ...right? [Plain style]+[Noun] (Noun modifiers) どこ(へ/に)も/何も/だれも not anywhere/not...anything/no one どこか/何か/だれか/いつか any-/some- Numeral Numbers 1-10 Month/Date/Day of the week Days and months ~時~分 o'clock, minutes Expressions of times Time references 何さい how old... ~まい (counter for flat objects) ~ほん (counter for long objects) ~ひき (counter for small animals) ~だい (counter for equipment) ~さつ (counter for bound volumes) ~人 (counter for people) ~こ (counter for smaller items) ~つ (generic counter for items) ~と〜とどちらが which is more ...than... ~でどれがいちばん〜 which is the most...

docs.title: こ/そ/あ/ど
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning demonstrative pronouns

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
こ: 近い、そ: 相手に近い、あ: 遠い、ど: わからない

こ: near speaker, そ: near listener, あ: far from both, ど: unseen/unknown

docs.title: これ/それ/あれ/どれ
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning this/that/that one over there/which

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
これ、それ、あれ、どれ

This, that, that one over there, which

docs.title: この/その/あの [Noun]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning this/that [Noun]

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このりんご

This apple

docs.title: ここ/そこ/あそこ/どこ
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning here/there/over there/where

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ここ、そこ、あそこ、どこ

Here, there, over there, where

docs.title: ~です
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning to be/ it is (polite)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
わたしは先生です。

I'm a teacher.

docs.title: ~じゃありません
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning not to be/ it is not (polite)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
わたしは日本人じゃありません。

I'm not Japanese.

docs.title: ~ですか
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (indicates question: sentence end)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あなたは先生ですか

Are you a teacher?

docs.title: はい/いいえ
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning yes/no

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
はい、わたしは日本人です。

Yes, I'm Japanese.

docs.title: そうです
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (answer) it is/that's right

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
はい、そうです。

Yes, I am/that's right.

docs.title: あります/います
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning there is..., have...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
テーブルの上に、はながあります

There are flowers on the table.

docs.title: Locations
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning at/in a location

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
えきのまえで、友だちに会います。

I meet my friends in front of the station.

docs.title: [Noun] がほしいです
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning I want [Noun]

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
新しい車がほしいです

I want a new car.

docs.title: ~なります
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning become...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
むすめさん、大きくなりましたね

Your daughter has grown up.

docs.title: [Place] に行きます/来ます/かえります
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning go/come/back to [Place]

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
6時ですから、うちにかえります

I'm going home, it's 6 o'clock.

docs.title: ~が好き/きらい/上手/下手
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning like/dislike/be good at/be bad at

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
わたしはうんてんが下手です。

I'm not good at driving.

docs.title: あげます/くれます/もらいます
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (receiving and giving)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
リンさんは、わたしのおとうとに本をくれました

Mr. Lin gave my younger brother a book.

docs.title: ~ませんか
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (inviting someone)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あした、えいがを見に行きませんか

Would you like to go see a movie?

docs.title: [Adjective]+[Noun]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning adjective modifying a noun

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
しんせつな先生です。

He is a kind teacher.

docs.title: ~は~が [Adjective]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (the topic has the characteristic '~が [Adj]')

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
東京は、人が多いです。

There are a lot of people in Tokyo.

docs.title: 〜も
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning also/too

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ごしゅじんも、日本人ですか。

Is your husband also Japanese?

docs.title: ~を
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (object marker)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
コーヒーを飲みます。

I drink coffee.

docs.title: [a starting point] を [Verb]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning leaving/getting off

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
しぶやで電車をおります。

I get off the train at Shibuya.

docs.title: [Place] を [motion Verb]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning moving through a place

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
こうえんをあるきます。

I walk in the park.

docs.title: [Place] に/で
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (location particles)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
いえでべんきょうする。

Study at home.

docs.title: [Quantifier]に
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning frequency per period

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
二日に一回、ジムに行きます。

I go to the gym once every two days.

docs.title: の
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (used in place of a noun)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このくつは、あなたのですか、先生のですか

Are these shoes yours or the teacher's?

docs.title: [Person/Animal] と
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning with [Person/Animal]

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
おとうととえいがを見ます。

I watch a movie with my younger brother.

docs.title: [Noun] の [Noun]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning [Noun] + [Noun]

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今日のしんぶん

Today's Newspaper

docs.title: [Noun] と [Noun]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning [Noun] and [Noun]

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
りんごとぶどうとバナナがあります。

There are apples, grapes, and bananas.

docs.title: ~や~
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning things like... and...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
かばんの中にスマホやさいふがあります。

There are a smartphone, a wallet and other things in my bag.

docs.title: [Noun]で
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning [Noun] = tool/range/place

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
としょかんでべんきょうします。

I study at a library.

docs.title: ~から〜まで
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning from...to...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
東京から大阪まで、しんかんせんで行きます

I go from Tokyo to Osaka by Shinkansen (express train).

docs.title: が/けど
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning but...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
雨ですが、うんどうします。

It's raining but I'm going to exercise.

docs.title: [Verb]こと/の
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (nominalization)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
毎日うんどうすること/のは、たいへんです。

It's hard to exercise everyday.

docs.title: ~から
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning because...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
時間がないから、タクシーで行きましょう

We're short on time, so let's take a taxi.

docs.title: ~ね
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning isn't it/right?

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このりょうり、おいしいですね。

That meal is delicious, isn't it?

docs.title: ~よ
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (informing the listener of something, or for emphasis)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
今日、あの店は休みですよ。

That shop is closed today, you know.

docs.title: Verb Group [dictionary-form] Version
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning G1 (-u, -aru/uru/oru), G2 (-iru/eru), G3 (suru/kuru)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲む(G1)、食べる(G2)、する(G3)、来る(G3)

Basic verb groups.

docs.title: Verb Group [masu-form] Version
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning G1 (-imasu), G2 (-emasu/imasu), G3 (shimasu/kimasu)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲みます(G1)、食べます(G2)、します(G3)、来ます(G3)

Polite verb groups.

docs.title: Verb 辞書形
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Verb dictionary-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲む、食べる、する、来る

[dictionary-form] of drink, eat, do, come

docs.title: Verb ます形
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Verb masu-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲みます、食べます、します、来ます

[masu-form] of drink, eat, do, come

docs.title: Verb ない形
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Verb nai-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲まない、食べない、しない、来ない

[nai-form] of drink, eat, do, come

docs.title: Verb て形
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Verb te-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲んで、食べて、して、来て

[te-form] of drink, eat, do, come

docs.title: Verb た形
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Verb ta-form

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
飲んだ、食べた、した、来た

[ta-form] of drink, eat, do, come

docs.title: ~てください/〜ないでください
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning please do.../don't do...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ここに名前を書いてください。

Please write your name in here.

docs.title: ~ています
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (an action in progress) (a condition, habit, not a current action)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
テレビを見ています

I'm watching TV.

docs.title: ~てはいけません
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning must not...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
タバコをすってはいけません。ここはきんえんです。

You must not smoke. Here is No Smoking area.

docs.title: ~てもいいですか
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning may I [Verb]

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あかいペンをつかってもいいですか

May I use a red pen?

docs.title: ~て
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (how to join two or more sentences together)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
7時におきて、あさごはんを食べて、学校に行く

I wake up at 7:00, eat breakfast, and go to school.

docs.title: ~てから
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning after [Verb]/[Verb] and then...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このしごとがおわってから、かえります。

I'll leave after this job is done.

docs.title: ~たことがあります
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning have the experience of V-ing

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
日本に行ったことがありますか

Have you ever been to Japan?

docs.title: ~たり〜たり
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning [Verb], [Verb] so on...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
うたったり、おどったりしました

I sang and danced, among other things.

docs.title: ~ましょうか
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning shall we/I [Verb]

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
いっしょに行きましょうか

Shall we go together?

docs.title: ~たいです
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning I want to [Verb]

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ピザが食べたいです

I want to eat pizza.

docs.title: ~に行きます
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning I'm going (an event)/ to (do)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ランチを食べに行きます。

I'm going to eat lunch.

docs.title: ~まえに
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning before...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
テレビを見るまえに、しゅくだいをします。

I do my homework before I watch TV.

docs.title: ~(こと)ができます
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning can do...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
日本語ができますか。

Can you speak Japanese?

docs.title: ~ことです
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (adding こと to a verb makes a noun)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
わたしのしゅみは、ホラーえいがを見ることです。

My hobby is watching horror movies.

docs.title: どんな [Noun]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning what kind of...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
どんなえいがが好きですか。

What kind of movies do you like?

docs.title: どうですか
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning how about, how...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
日本のせいかつはどうですか。

How is life in Japan?

docs.title: 何(なん/なに)
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning what

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
しゅうまつは、何をしますか。

What do you plan to do this weekend?

docs.title: どうやって
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning how...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
どうやって学校に行きますか

How do you get to the school?

docs.title: どれ/どの [Noun]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning which...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あなたの自転車は、どれですか。

Which one is your bicycle?

docs.title: もう/まだ
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning already/not yet

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
もう、しゅくだいはおわりましたか。

Did you already do your homework?

docs.title: よく/だいたい/たくさん/少し/あまり/ぜんぜん
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Adverbs of degree/quantity

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
きのうのテスト、よくできましたか

Did you do well on yesterday's test?

docs.title: Plain style [Verb]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Dictionary, nai, ta, nakatta forms

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
行く、行かない、行った、行かなかった

go, don't go, went, didn't go

docs.title: Plain style [i-Adjective]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Present, negative, past, past negative

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
大きい、大きくない、大きかった、大きくなかった

it's big, it's not big, it was big, it wasn't big

docs.title: Plain style [na-Adjective/Noun]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning da, ja nai, datta, ja nakatta forms

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
すきだ、すきじゃない、すきだった、すきじゃなかった

like, don't like, liked, didn't like

docs.title: Conversations in Plain style
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Casual conversation tone

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あしたのパーティーに、行く?

Are you going to a party tomorrow?

docs.title: Polite style [Verb]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning masu, masen, mashita, masen deshita forms

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
行きます、行きません、行きました、行きませんでした

go, don't go, went, didn't go

docs.title: Polite style [i-Adjective]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning desu, kunai desu, katta desu, kunakatta desu

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
大きいです、大きくないです、大きかったです、大きくなかったです

it's big, it's not big, it was big, it wasn't big

docs.title: Polite style [na-Adjective]/[Noun]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning desu, ja arimasen, deshita, ja arimasen deshita

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
すきです、すきじゃありません、すきでした、すきじゃありませんでした

like, don't like, liked, didn't like

docs.title: ~とき
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning when...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
このくすりは、あたまがいたいとき飲んでください。

Take this medicine when you have a headache.

docs.title: ~でしょう?
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning ...right?

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
さっき、ごはんを食べたでしょう?

You just ate a meal, right?

docs.title: [Plain style]+[Noun]
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (Noun modifiers)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
きのう行ったレストラン、おいしかったですね

The restaurant we went to yesterday was delicious, wasn't it?

docs.title: どこ(へ/に)も/何も/だれも
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning not anywhere/not...anything/no one

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
れいぞうこに何もありません。

There's nothing in the fridge.

docs.title: どこか/何か/だれか/いつか
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning any-/some-

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
何か食べましょう。

Let's get something to eat.

docs.title: Numeral
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Numbers 1-10

docs.title: Month/Date/Day of the week
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Days and months

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
しがついつか、にちようびです。

5/Apr, (Sun)

docs.title: ~時~分
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning o'clock, minutes

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
4時半にかえります。

I will leave at 4:30.

docs.title: Expressions of times
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning Time references

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
せんげつ、こんげつ、らいげつ

last month, this month, next month

docs.title: 何さい
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning how old...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
はちじゅうはっさいです

(I'm) 88 years old.

docs.title: ~まい
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (counter for flat objects)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
シャツがいちまい

One shirt.

docs.title: ~ほん
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (counter for long objects)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ペンがにほん

Two pens.

docs.title: ~ひき
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (counter for small animals)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
いぬがごひき

Five dogs.

docs.title: ~だい
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (counter for equipment)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
くるまがいちだい

One car.

docs.title: ~さつ
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (counter for bound volumes)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
ほんがじゅっさつ

Ten books.

docs.title: ~人
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (counter for people)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
先生がふたり

Two teachers.

docs.title: ~こ
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (counter for smaller items)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
りんごがみっつ

Three apples.

docs.title: ~つ
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning (generic counter for items)

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
あめがよっつ

Four candies.

docs.title: ~と〜とどちらが
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning which is more ...than...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
やきゅうとサッカーとどちらがすきですか。

Which do you like more, baseball or football?

docs.title: ~でどれがいちばん〜
docs.text: Level N5 Meaning which is the most...

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
くだもので、どれがいちばんすきですか

Which fruit is your favorite?

docs.title: 分詞解析
docs.text: 表面形 讀音 詞性 原形 夢 ゆめ 名詞 夢 なら なら 助動詞 だ ば ば 助詞 ば

docs.title: 意思 (Meaning)
docs.text: 夢: dream

docs.title: 文法 (Grammar)
docs.text: なら → ⚠️ 未收錄（だ）

docs.title: 例句 (Example)
docs.text:
